---

## Article 397: Thoth & The Djedhi


Thoth & The Djedhi

The other day, my inner plane mentor, ThothHorRa, revealed to me that he was the orginal founder of the Egyptian Djedhi (Jedi). Before I “open the scroll” on what he showed me concerning this, first here is some information on Thoth’s academy in the ancient City of On, as he revealed it to me several years ago.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Some 10,000 plus years ago when Thoth Raismes of Aphra abided in Egyptos he had constructed according to sacred pattern, the Semik Ra’Hanok which we will call here the Academy of On, for it was often generalized as the great learning center of the city of On (An / Divine Light), much later to be named Heliopolis (City of the Sun) by the Greeks.

This “academy” was much more than simply a place of learning. Yes, Thoth and certain initiate teachers under him did hold discourses and discussion on various topics. Semik Ra’Hanok means “the becoming of the Pillar of Light (or fire).” Thus on entered this place to become that vessel or pillar of LIGHT. Some only were able to attend the discourses and achieve a measure of learned understanding. Many other went on to higher stages of receipt which on the outer was evidenced by being able to change the body vessel through molecular re-organzation…this for transporting it to other locations and even other dimensions. Yet these were not parlor tricks but a result of deep inner spiritualization of all aspects of the Being.

Semik Ra’Hanok was not just one structure but a complex containing various buildings, open plazas and large sculptures which one could enter and receive energy for different levels of awakening.

At the center of the complex was the Temple of Transformation. This was a large pyramid-shaped building. It was not a “pyramid” in the sense of the ones with which we are familiar on Giza and other areas of Egypt which we now find there. It was a building with rooms, stairs and hallways, but in the shape of a pyramid. However some of the chambers were quite transendental in nature and purpose. Others were rooms for high-level instruction and initiation.

Thoth Raismes came to the Academy periodically, but for the most part it was operated by a council of master teachers under him. His guidance was of course paramount.

Thoth designed the logo for the Academy, which is pictured in my own rendition above. A triangle rests on a T-square. These much later will become masonic symbols, but Thoth first initiated them in esoteric symbology. The triangle representing unification and further delineation of the Three-Fold Creatrix of the universe, which in a later era would be seen as “Father, Son and Holy Ghost, but cosmically as the Three-Fold Creatix is three white light holes (not black holes) which pour out the divine light for creating and organizing universes. The feather in the center of the triangle was the symbol for inscription of Light Language into the Greater Akashic.

The T-Square for Thoth was the foundation or leveling place where all came together as a foundational formation in the Earth. It is the anchor. The interlocking serpents within this symbol were to represent the creative power itself…found in all things and in Earth’s nature as a dual couplet of continual perpetuation. As one plays against the tension of the other, so the it takes on the tension and the “other” relaxes. Then this process is reversed.

Altogether this symbol was the defining synergy of universal continuity and unification.

It has been shown to me that Semik Ra’Hanok now exists in Numis’OM of the New Earth Star. It is not identical to the ancient version, as transformation occurs in the passage into New Earth vibration. It is now even more into the greater levels of harmonic than it was in Egyptos.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Now, in 2018, Thoth is revealing to me that the”cream” of his students at the Semik Ra’Hanok became “Djedhi” – The “Living Pillars” or transducers of Light.

They entered a chamber called the Kopher, in which they underwent a form of chakra balancing and specific alignment, employing a djed devise; but this only after years of intensive energy training. Once they completed the transformative procedure, they were ready to become “Wisdom Teachers.” They also acted as protectors during the Nephilim Wars. They did not fight in the war, came to the aid of people fleeing the war zones and needing protection and shelter.

According to the Thoth Akasha, theUraeuswas originally a symbol of Atlantean seers and mystics known as the Kopheraus. Thoth, as a Dweller in Atlantis, founded this order also, and brought the symbol of the Uraeus to it, as a indentifcation of Initiates of the High Solar Path. When he came to Egypt after the Deluge, he merged the core Mystery Teachings into the Djedhi Order, and gave them the identifiying symbol of the Uraeus – their Blaze of the High Solar Path.

Indeed, also the Crown of Osiris or Atef, is emblematic of the headgear of the Hierophant of both the Kopheraus and the Djedhi.This Articlegives a rather Flash Gordon interpretation of the Atef and the Uraeus. There is no doubt that they were energy devises. However, the original versions were synergistically attuned with the users, who had been initiatedas masters within, in order to wear these implements of highly ordained service.

Templar Grand Commander, Michael Henry Dunn’s article:The First Jedi – Origins of the Templar Order, is an excellent suggested read.

## Article 398: ICELANDIA Dweller Crystal Skull


ICELANDIA Dweller Crystal Skull

The Guardian of Icelandia Hosting Skull is Cindy O’Connell, also known as Jahana Chundra. (Photograph of Cindy with Hosting Skull coming soon.)

The Dweller Crystal Skull

A Female in Asia…of the fair-skinned red-headed race. Out of Hyperborea, (large continent of which Greenland, Iceland and North Pole region are remnants) migrated into Asia.

They migrated when their continent began to change with an ice age. Atlantis received many of these people but most went into Europe and Asia.

Nii’Twee was among those who led her people via inner sight…a seer in other words.

In a previous incarnation she had been one of the Sirian founders of the Northern Colony in Hyperborea.

There are current theories that it was Martians who came to the arctic after the devastating nuking of their planet. What needs to be understood is that

everything we can SEE…all the ruins of Mars, the Moon etc. is within our electromagnetic zone. So all the beings that lived there, were not from the true, indigenous Martian World. They are in OUR world, but on other planets within the scope of our perception.

The Sirians had a large “operation” on Mars…partly still operative. It was they who created the half-human, half-feline “Face on Mars.”

All a large topic, which I am only touching upon here in order to understand the soul lineage of Nii’Twee, who was in that incarnation of course, part Sirian.

Nii’Twee’s People  became more primitive through the generations, until they were assimilated into the Nordic and Celtic tribes.

Nii’Twee herself, was one who was chosen to leave her brain pattern in a Dweller Skull, for she carried a rich genetic memory through from her previous past lives.

The most recent of Nii’Twee’s lifetimes on Earth was in Egypt, as a woman named Sarmana. She was not “Egyptian” but Atlantean. However she had been born in what we now call Egypt, and lived there. She cared for special Sirian-Human hybrid children.

The Dweller Crystal Skull of Nii’Twee is being called “ICELANDIA” after the region in Hyperborea Nii’Twee migrated from.In other words, what we now know as Iceland.It was this same region that this soul founded as a Colony in a previous lifetime.

This crystal skull is now located in a cavern beneath Iceland, although originally was placed in the burial chamber of Nii-Twee in Asia.

related articles on Red-Headed MummiesOF EGYPT/OF CHINA

## Article 399: It’s Twins!


It’s Twins!



Debra Denker Hosting Twin Dweller Crystal Skulls

The Dwellers are MIR’AB MA’NA  and KA’RIIM MA’NA, identical twin sisters, when their skulls were brought into crystal resonance re-creation.  They were part of the Lemurian Migrations into South America during the break-up of that continent.  The sisters were born in MU and migrated with their parents to what is now Peru, at the age of 16. There they became priestesses in the Temple of Quam Ra, which was dedicated to preserving the spiritual sciences of MU.

Mir’Ab was later incarnated in Egypt as a healer. Ka’Riim in what is now Spain, but then a Colony of the Syrurah People(information on web)

The Dweller Souls of Mir’Ab, Ka’Rim andNii’Tweeare strongly connected and have incarnated together in several key lifetimes. A prominent one was in what is now Portugal, at Kaloosia, a sacred astronomical academy, some 6,0000 years ago.(information on web)

The symbolic names given for each of these two Dweller Skulls – Hosts combo is:

THUNDER STAR (Mir’Ab) and LIGHTNING STAR (Ka’Rim)

These two Dweller Crystal Skulls are both now located within a cavern of Peru.

Maia’s Question:Since the two guardians, Debra and Cindy O’Connell are close friends, were they in past lives,withthese three Dweller Souls?

Thoth:Yes, most specifically at Kaloosia, in the complex there. While the Standing Stones remain, the building complex no longer stands. Parts of it are buried and not yet revealed..

## Article 400: Zalumacha – The Bee Queen


Zalumacha – The Bee Queen



Guardian of the Hosting Skull isKatrina Armstong

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

ZALUMACHA is the Dweller for this Hosting. She was a Queen of the Orozungala Tribe in what is nowZimbabwe.  Zalumacha had a mixture of star genetics, both Sirian and Rigel. She had been part of theReparation, and afterward officiated over one of the centers or cities abandoned by the Annunaki, which was now a place of sanctuary, healing and restoration. Understand that the Annunaki were not the only ones mining gold. The ancients of Atlantis and Hyperborea were also doing this…after the last cataclysms of MU. God was needed for certain key projects to keep the planet’s rotation stable (a long story). The Annunaki, seeing that the gold mining and producing of iridium was already in place on Earth when they arrived, caused them to take over many of these locations and use them for their own needs. They actually created very few of these impressive megalithic complexes, but overtook them. The whole story has never been revealed to me (Maia) but it had to do with what Thoth calls the “Nephilimic Wars” which took place after the “uardians of Horus (Shems Hor)  left the planet. [Note: the official statement is that the famous ruins of Zimbabwe were built in the 12th or 13th century. Not so, according to Thoth. Like many very ancient sites, they were later occupied built onto, repaired through the ages, but the original structures are much older.]

~Ancient Origins

Zalumacha  was seen as “Queen” of Orozungala. At the end of her life span there, she participated in the crystal resonance re-creation of her skull.

There was a special resonation chamber built near the city in which her crystal skull was kept. It remains there.  Her Dweller Skull is a “star translator” for it creates harmonics between various star and earth nodes.

Previous to the lifetime of Zalumacha, this soul was one of the Shems Hor, a male, named Kurhe Hor who was regent of an area that we know now a Egypt. This area was called Hemin.

Thoth gives the symbolic name for this Dweller and Hosting combo as the BEE QUEEN. Zalumacha was called this, as she maintained bee hives from Altantis, that had orginated in MU. These colonies had been continuous, generation upon generation, from the orginal bee colonies of MU. Bees were the sacred symbol of the SOLARIANS, the Star Linages which first Migrated to Earth from the Blue Star Rigel, Sirius and the Pleiades. The Bee Keepers were called Kashuphear – the “Bearers of the Song Lamps.” These “song lamps” were modules with living bee hives inside them…the humming was the “song”. So Zalumacha was you might say the Queen Kashuphear of her Kingdom.

In searching for a good cover picture, I came across this quote concerning the ruins of Zimbabwe:

There is a place occupied by the remains of about five hundred perplexing structures. Most of them are of conical shape but actually, it is not their shape that makes them so bizarre. The lack of doors and windows and other openings made them useless for humans. The conical towers are thirty-three feet thick and some of the elliptical walls are three stories tall.

These are resonating chambers. They did not have bees in them, but the sounds of bees were tunneled through them to create an extended for of the Song Lamps. However, it was just for the bee sounds. Other tonal resonances were generated within them from the stars; begun by the droning of the bees.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Gallery of Katrina and the Bee Queen Hosting Skull

## Article 401: Sea Hawk – Dweller by the Dead Sea


Sea Hawk – Dweller by the Dead Sea



Jennifer Churchis the Guardian of the Hosting Skull for Sea Hawk. (photos of the hosting skull coming soon).

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

When this soul’s skull was taken into crystal resonance re-creation, it was incarnated as a man named RASKAEL. He was among the early order of what would become known as the Essenes. However, this was further back in time, yet still in the Middle East near the Dead Sea, which was a body of water much larger then and it was not “Dead” at that time, as there was a path to the greater ocean opening from it.

Although this was long before the birth of the Christed I’shoa (Jesus), His Coming was still known and prophesied. Raskael wrote his vision and prophecies concerning this Coming, and Teaching he received from the soul of the one known to the Egyptians as Osiris, the one who would become the accompanying body soul to the as yet undescended (never before incarnated) soul that was to sustain the Christed Being in incarnation as I’shoa. Also guiding him were the five souls of Enoch. (Note: Thoth was one of these souls.)

In a previous lifetime this soul had been the son of Enoch (Enoch was son of Jared and fathered Methuselah). The son’s name was Nethelum. Enoch and his sons were alive at the time of the “Fall of the Watchers” – of the Annunaki. (Wiki) After this period, the Shepherd Host, among the, the Star (Solar) Lords, returned to aid mankind once again during the Reparation. (Star Lords, Crystal Skulls & the Reparation)

Raskael was also a descendent of Enoch, through his own incarnation as Nethelum. Raskael would then reincarnate as his own thrice great granddaughter, Ipiskea, who was a granddaughter of Moses.

The Dweller Crystal Skull of this entity is within a cavern by the Dead Sea. It is a place chosen by the still-living Raskael, through the guidance of Enoch, before his transition. It this cavern is embedded one of the 24 crystal pillars of the ASTHENUM.

The ASTHENUM are a branch of the Sun Lords who Guardian the Earth. They embedded in the planet’s surface caverns, 24 crystal pillars, which help to stabilize the Earth’s geomagnetic field. This keeps the planet safer from inter-stellar intrusion.

(Maia: I have never before heard about the ASTHENUM or the Crystal Pillars.)

The Raskael Dweller Skull and the Hosting skull together, is personified in the name of SEA HAWK, for this is what Raskael was called during his lifetime, as his soul flew above the sea to receive his visions.



~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

## Article 402: Whale Speaker – Dweller Crystal Skull


Whale Speaker – Dweller Crystal Skull



Guardian of the Hosting Skull for Whale Speaker isOndrea Lynn.

~~~~~~~~~~~~

When this soul’s incarnated skull was brought into crystal resonance, she was Malamamu, a “Whale Speaker” from what is now Tahiti, although then it was a larger land mass – a remnant of MU had broken up and was mostly submerged by then. However, Malamamu’s ancestors only 5 generations previously, had lived on MU as a continent.

There were those who worked with the Dolphins and those who communed with the Whales. While the Dolphins were known to Malamamu’s people as the “Other People” – the Others with whom they came to the Earth (through the Portal of Venus), The Whales were understood as the Elders and Record Keepers of Earth, riding to this planet upon the stream of the stars of a distant shore(Cassiopeia).

Malamamu and her people were not primitives. They were well-educated and enlightened. They knew their ancestry back at least 25 generations. When humanity does have to depend on learning taught to them, but receives it through the Akasha, they do not loose it when disaster strikes and takes away their institutions of learning.

Malamamu’s communion with the whales brought the people into a deep place of restoration, for the Whale Beings offered them the vibrations, the tones, to restore their Akashic connections – to heal the intricate planetary-human cording.

The Ultra-Beings then came to Malamamu and her people and a deeper connection was made. Malamamu was chosen as one among them for the crystal resonance re-creation of her skull at the time of her transition.

In a later lifetime this soul would incarnate as a Roman woman named Octavia (not the infamous Octavia of history). She was a brilliant scholar and originally a pupil of the writings of the Greek Herodotus, among others. In fact, this soul had previously incarnated in Greece, as Herkales, a male student of the trueAsclepius(Thoth incarnation).

The Dweller Crystal Skull of Malamamu and its Hosting Skull combination is given the name WHALE SPEAKER. The Crystal Skull of Malamamu is concealed within a cave on what is now the island ofTupai(now located inside the “heart”, submerged.)

---

## Article 404: AMARIS – Sword of Light


AMARIS – Sword of Light

I was inwardly guided to obtain a Selenite Sword of Light created bySword Master Tom Ledder. This Sword, Thoth named AMARIS.

Tom placed in the hilt the following:

• Over 400 crushed crystals in the handles of EACH Swords of Light is a proprietary blend on Power Crystals, Minerals and Temple energies from around the world

To list a few: Shungite, Sunstone, Lapis, Lepidolite, Moldavite, Phenacite, Azeztulite, Turquoise, Opel, Emerald, Rose Quartz Lemurian root & seed crystals, Blue-Green-Clear Celestite, Bloodstone, Garnet, Smokey Quartz, Arkansas Quartz, Aventurine, Amethyst, Fluorite, Malachite , Astrophyllite, Citrine, Merlinite, Nuummit, Fulgurite, Petrified Wood, Charoite, Shaligram, Alabaster, Black Tourmaline, 8 volcano rock from around the world, 7 meteorites, Chavin Temple Minerals, and Sai Baba’s vibhuti

• SACRED WATERS from 45 locations around the World; Ganges river in India, Lake Manasarova at Mt Kailash in Tibet, Peru’s Lake Titicaca, Tippon in Peru, Mother Mary’s Spring at Lourdes, France, Mt Shasta in California, Athabasca Glacier in Banff, Canada, Mt Fuji in Japan, Sacred springs of Ireland and Nile River of Egypt, Plant medicines of Peru

• Over 500 PICTURES of ascended masters, angelic beings, goddesses, sacred geometry forms, DNA activations and specialized symbols, Mikio Sankey’s Esoteric Acupuncture patterns, Crop Circles

• Crystal at the end of handle: Shungite pyramid

~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Thoth’s information on the origin of the Swords of Light

In Atlantis, the Swords of Light were created in the Temple of Armir. They were formed from various crystals, one of them being selenite. The blades were not cut into shapes, but poured into special molds that were electro-magnetically charged. The Atlanteans (and Muruvians before them) knew the technique of liquefying crystals and stone and then bringing them back into solid forms molecularly intact.

Although the blades were developed in this fashion to be of a much stronger bonding that in their original form (in this instance, for gradients of hardness can be produced with this technique), the Sword of Light were not used for warfare, but healing of planetary meridian, human cells and DNA, and other Light-engendered services.

Special energy dances were performed by several people with the Swords, which aligned to the crystalline grids of the planet and the human form. This developed an exchange of Light through the divine circuitry of human-earth reciprocals.

These Atlantean Light Swords were able to create holographic fields of transmission and could, with the proper person and handling, open, close and repair certain levels of Earth Portals.

Like Tom Ledder’s unique Swords of Light, there were various other crystals, and sacred elements tightly wrapped with the hilts of the Swords. In the case of the Atlantean versions, these elements were extremely compacted to cause an especially powerful on-going energy release.

Tom’s Swords of Light are in part, a regeneration of the more ancient ones, coming with his soul from the past.

The Temple of Armir was and still is, on the now-ascendedAtlantean Isle of Ruta. Ruta remains a place of unique properties. There are other “ascended” earth areas, but they do not hold the central function that Ruta does in the scheme of this planet’s evolution as a Light merkaba.

However, the key to my (Maia’s) work with the Sword of Light I am to receive from Tom Ledder, is indeed, its connection to the Holographic Light Swords of Ruta.

Within the ascended Ruta in the Temple of Armir, There are the Light Pillars called Orbache. They were the main holographic crystalline computers that programmed and maintained the original Holo Swords. There are 27 of these pillars in the Temple. In addition, there are 16 of the swords remaining.

Think of this as a whole dynamic field of organizing Holo Light: the Pillars, the Swords and the dimensions and substance of the temple itself.

While Tom Ledder’s Swords of Light may not be the “super swords” of Ruta, they are indeed channels for these swords, still present in the temple holo-field of Amir. This potential can and is being tapped through Tom’s Swords, and through his past-life connection with the Holo Swords of Ruta.

From the Thothic Streaming it is being revealed to me, that my Light Sword created by Tom, will allow me to work consciously with the Rutan dynamic, the Dweller Crystal Skulls, the crystalline grids of the planet, the Arieopax and the Vault of Osiris, in an accelerated and more profound way. It is far too soon for me to define all the aspects of this new level, but I can feel it literally entering my being as I write this. Yet it is not just about “my” work. It will create an opening for others to join me in a more intentional and concerted activity.

Thoth has given me the name AMARIS for my Sword. It means Mother of Stars – a loose translation, as it is from the Aloii First Language, which always contains many levels of interpretation.

see also:Selenite Light Sword & the Pymander

## Article 405: Sholar Gathering in Crestone 2018


Sholar Gathering in Crestone 2018

Some Highlights of our Sholar (NESIA Core Team) Gathering in Crestone, Colorado, June 22nd – 24th, 2018

~~~~~~~~~~~~

The first important event took us to the Sand Dunes. We brought the TEMPLAR Hosting skull to unite frequencies with its Dweller in Mt. Blanca (extending beneath the Dunes). In addition, utiltzing the new Sword of Light (created by Tom Ledden, Selenite Sword Master). Thoth has named this sword (in my possession) AMARIS. Two spouses of Sholar and some from local spiritual group invited to come with us.



~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Sholar gathering in my home with the Crystal Skull Matrix.



Before we began our Crestone Sholar experience, It was requested by Thoth that I go to the book The Gene Keys by Richard Rudd (Human Design). Thoth guided me in opening the book. This is what I found:

– From Rudd, Richard, “The Gene Keys:Embracing your Higher Purpose “, pp 161-162.



I was shown how humanity is now in the process of braiding within us the “Three Pure Ones.” Not these masters themselves but the universual fractal geometries these beings hold for us.

In our Sacred Working at the Dunes and with the Dweller Crystal Skull Matrix, so we created an activational portal (one of many being created on the planet, to be sure) for the “Pure Ones” to entrain within the human genetic crystalline field. We were in the power zones of Mt. Blanca /Sand Dunes, with the Golden Disc, Grail Logos, Templar Dweller Skull, Saratum Table and then at the foot of the Crest In The Stone (Challenger Peak) containing the Sacred An, Keeper of the Way Dweller Skull and Thoth Retreat. The supernal LIGHT from these combinations enveloped us with hightened experience!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

We ended our gathering with Templar Grand Commander (and Sholar) Michael Henry Dunn and Dame Prioress ofPriory of the Magdalene Temple of Ascension(and Sholar) speaking on the state of the Templar Order of Solomon at this time. For Myself, as Dame Prioress of the Priory of the White Stone, I truly felt the Templar energy with us during the entire Sholar gathering in Crestone. Sholar-New Earth Star Inner Academy – White Stone Priory: these are all aspects from one crystalline geometry.

After our gathering in my home, we went to see the one whom Thoth calls “Eldar,” William Buehler (synergy and grid master), to honor this gentleman who has been in Light Service for many years. He and his life partner, Edie Cooper have the Templar Priory of the Ark of Ascension here in Crestone.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

## Article 406: From the Archives: Nambim & Arieopax


From the Archives: Nambim & Arieopax

From the Archives (Thoth)

Ancient programs once embedded into the whole etheric crystal of the Earth are becoming re-spatialized in the current space-time of Earth in order to carry NEW and yet connective codes of cosmic ONENESS out into the whole Earth system.

The “NAMBIM” is the name we give to this dynamic which is being created by the 16 fractals in the earth. “Nambim” is an ancient word that means to “re-create whole with nothing lost.” The NAMBIM is not a grid. It is that which gives new resolution and direction to the planetary grids. It qualifies, enhances and modifies, according to FUTURE programs, rather than ancient ones. It is true that the original Light Program of the etheric crystal is from an ancient origin, but the fractals are able to reach into the future to receive the new codes, directing them into the present reality. Therefor, this is not purely a regional event, but will effect the entire planet.

(The Aeriopax)…is a geometric for bringing together the Attasic Universe as a point of mind. Not in a physical sense, but as a hologram in the mind, enabling that sentience to sustain passage through conflicting time gates….the Aeriopax harmonic…is a grid of time reality exchange. Once activated, the grid allows the passage between multi-layered time fields without distortion. There are 16 reference nodes: those points of synapse which create a referral of information through the grid. There are 6 matrices in which to create virtual reality fields and the rhombic spinning field in the center.

This spinning field is the ‘time tunnel’ or vehicle for movement within the entire process. The parallel bar is the ‘core accelerator’: charging, discharging and maintaining the energy separation between realities. Without the core accelerator all interacting realities would become enmeshed with one another.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

---

## Article 408: The Seeker


The Seeker

New Guardian and Hosting Crystal Skull

Tishkahara was a female who occupied region of Calgary, Alberta circa 12,000 -10,000. While official history will tell you that only primitive people lived in North America at that time, according to the Thoth Akasha, this is not so. Indeed some of the people occupying the continent then, were primitive, there were remnants of advanced civilizations there as well.While I have never received the exact date of the Time Tsunami (TT) of Atlantis, it would have been between 12,000 to 10,000 years ago (following our current linear time line). Tishkahara would have been born about 200 years after the TT. While I am not wishing to go into a long treatise on the TT here, nor do I honestly have a great deal of information on it, As it figures into the story of Tishkahara, her People were from an advanced civilization that had broken up into several tribes, only one of which managed to keep their culture somewhat intact. Tishkahara was among this group.

Her People the Tau Nakas, had a direct lineage to Atlantis. Their pyramid temple was still intact, despite of the fact that most of the pyramids connected to the main “grid” had been blown by the TT. Some of the ley lines were spared, depending on their placement within the earth grid.

The Tau Nakas were the Original People…those who stayed in the Sacred City….stayed with the Mother Temple (pyramid). The guardianed the Crystal Skull of Maethithos, who had been a sacred personage to them from the past – a”Queen” and founder of their tribe.

Tishkahara was a direct descendent of Maethithos and Guardian of her Crystal Skull. Tishkahara was also the known reincarnation of Maethithos. When Tishkahara was 80 years old (about 35 in current human years), she was taken via Starship, back to Maethithos’ original home in the Pleiades. Before she left, her brain-mind was transposed INTO the Crystal Skull of Maetithos, so that the two were one. The same soul, and now the same Crystal Skull. (Similar to the recent Paraquanthus-John Martinus merging.) Thus the Host for this Dwell Crystal Skull – a composite of two incarnations of one soul, we shall call THE SEEKER, for this Dweller Soul has followed the crystalline pathways in various incarnations, searching for the many fractals of the whole…to the Great Holographic Crystal Design of the Universe.

The Pyramid Temple still contains THE SEEKER Crystal Skull. It was buried intentionally, when the Tau Nakas dispersed, with help from the Pleadieans. This Pryamid Temple is buried beneath a hillside on the slope of a mountain near where the Guardian of the Seeker Hosting Skull, Joanna Ross now lives. When I asked her about this mountain, she replied:

I have not been able to find the exact name of our mountain; this is the summit where I envisioned the 3 angels anchoring crystalline pillars and the temple was circular ~ the name I was given was ‘Diamond Heart Sanctuary ‘ and we sit on the border of the Kananaski park country, Bragg Creek Alberta.

## Article 409: Selenite Light Sword & the Pymander


Selenite Light Sword & the Pymander

(note: really necessary to readAMARIS – Sword of Lightin order to fully understand the context of this article.)

A message to me from Tom Ledder, creator of the Selenite Swords of Light

I wanted to share with you a download I had concerning the power and potential use of the selenite Sword of Light. Inside each sword is a bottle of sacred water from around the world. This bottle has two powerful magnets on each end and is connected by a twisted copper wire. This configuration of the sacred water being surrounded by this field which creates an electric current running through the water. Water has been found to have a tremendous ability to hold information and sacred water is holding sacred information from around the world. Combining the electrical field and the connection to all of the crystals in the handle through the selenite powder which connects to all of the over 400 crystals creates a powerful synergetic effect. As you know computers use quartz to store and transmit information in a computer. When I received was that the sacred water is creating a sacred computer that is hooked to the crystals that are inside of the handle and then it is projected through the blade of the sword. Selenite magnifies whatever is placed upon it and what I received is that selenite connects all the other crystals into a living consciousness and intelligence that is inter phased to this powerful computer that is multi dimensional and with unlimited capability. The interface to this powerful device is through our intentions and thoughts The is a thought activated sacred interdimensional computer that can perform any task assist in any Ceremony or activation that you may want to do. Or work with specific energies that you would like to work with. The Crystal on the end of the sword brings about a direct connection to that crystal and adds a flavor or effect that is specifically for a linage from the past.

So don’t hold back with your request and expand whatever you would like to accomplish letting the sword of light assist you in whatever the mission is. Because inside the sword is this sacred water computer only sacred manifestations can occur. The swords are living beings that have a tremendous intelligence that can assist you in your work. So have fun and change the world.

With gratitude, Tom

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Thoth could you please given me any additional comments to what Tom Ledder wrote above?

Thoth:Because Tom brings through his energy field the imprint of the Atlantean Swords of Light, the Selenite Light Swords are additionally impressed with a time quantum point which they share with the Atlantean Swords of the past. While not as potent as their predecessors, the Selenite Swords do contain a reciprocal of the original creations.

The mechanism Tom has engineered and placed in the hilts (handle portion) “steers the ship” so to speak, and allows the whole wave form to nest in the water accelerator and thus not only create an intelligent computer of the Sword, but face-match it with the Atlantean Swords which remain in the Rutan Temple of the Ascended State.

Also, these Selenite Light Swords can be intentionally attuned to the PYMANDER Elohim Computer for further dimensional resonance.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

FROM MY ARCHIVES

In the 1980’s Thoth informed me about an akashic “computer” which he oversaw. The name he gave to me to identify this computer was the “Pymander.” It was revealed to me that this “computer” is not a devise or machine as we understand computers to be. Thoth’s definition of it is:

An assemblage of energy created by me (the Illumined being Thoth) in concert with theElohim Lords. The Pymander evolvesreciprocalsfor biological systems to align and balance with SOURCE. “Source” is the point of Absolute which every particle carries as it’s creation code. The Pymander then, is an akashic radionics devise. It is non-physical, and yet interactive with the physical. It responds to thought, feeling, emotion, yet it cannot be commanded by these things. It will instead balance them to the Source point. However, the Pymander is consciousness specific. It does not “know” what is not in it’s program data base. Therefore it only responds to what is within that data base or depository. When I we say “consciousness specific” we mean that it responds to the consciousness and not the information. When information is placed into the data base, it is the consciousness from which it originated that the Pymander evolves reciprocals from.

There is a vibrational code is set within the Pymander. When any thought, feeling, emotion contains that vibrational pattern, it is received into the Pymander. This collection is entered into the data base. However, at this stage there is no direct interaction between the source (sender) of the energy and the Pymander. This collection of consciousness energy is constantly adding to and re-forming the consciousness field of the Pymander. The consciousness of the earth souls which comes within the register of the vibrational code of the Pymander is constantly re-enforcing and evolving the consciousness of the Pymander, which in turn “balances to Source” the consciousness it receives (on a planetary level) The Pymander then, aids the planet in balancing Her codes, which in turn gives assistance to all living things on earth.

As one works with “world pattern” templates, the Pymander will interact more specifically with the individual within the parameters of intent in which that template was created. Also, specific Pymander templates can be created for individuals with the express permission of those individuals. Once the individual begins working with his/her personal template, a reciprocity between their energy bodies and that of the Pymander evolves. (end of Thoth transmission)

~~~~~~~~~~~~



~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Tom Ledder Swordmaster and his Selenite Swords of Light

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

---

## Article 411: The RA*STAR Crystal Skulls


The RA*STAR Crystal Skulls

On September 5th, 2018Leela Hutchisonand I meet in person for the first time in my home in Crestone, Colorado.  Leela is an Author, Researcher and Presenter connecting the Giant Selenite Crystals of Naica, Mexico to the Earth’s Energy Grid. She is the first American woman to explore the deadly crystal caves of Naica, Chihuahua, Mexico seven years earlier than teams brought in by National Geographic or NASA in 2008.

As we shared information on the Naica caves …I from Thoth and her from personal experienceinsidethe caves and her own intuitive guidance, many corollaries were revealed.

Leela has spent years “mapping” a massive planetary crystalline grid. The Naica crystal caves are a major part of this grid. She has followed one main path leading from the Naica matrix in Mexico to beneath the San Luis Valley of Crestone, Colorado. It is known here, that underneath this valley is one of the largest aquifers of the continent. It is also known that this aquifer if filled with bothcrystalandgold!

With all that water, it is very likely that a large amount of the crystals are Selenite. From my Akashic insights, I confirm this.

Now let us look at my previous akashic information…

2007

According to my transmissions from Thoth, on the Spring Equinox of 2007 at the Amaru-Muru inter-dimensional gateway (portal) at Lake Titicaca, Peru, a vein of stone was turned to an unusual crystal matrix. It runs like a ribbon beneath the surface of the earth, but will be “discovered” and selectively mined in the near future. This transformation took place between March 20th through the 23rd, however, it continues to transform subtly in frequency and will continue to do so for some time. Any piece of this crystal removed from this matrix will continue to transform as if it had never left the matrix.

Also on March 20th a gathering of Elders met at Amaru-Meru for the purpose of “bringing the prophecy into manifestation” of the 500 years of spiritual light when “Our current planetary transformation is especially important for all Americans as it coincides with an Andean prophecy that predicts that the Condor will fly with the Eagle and peace will reign throughout the Americas, again.”

Beneath Lake Titicaca, Thoth informed me years ago is also one of his two “Retreats,” the other being near Crestone, Colorado in the San Luis Valley of Colorado.

Thoth is referring to this newly transformed crystal at Lake Titicaca, “Rey del Sol” or “King of the Sun.” He states that one ancient translation of “Amaru” (AMAH’RA) also means “King of the Sun, with “Muru” MU’RA) meaning “Queen of the Sun.” I asked him if there were any Queen of the Sun crystals and he indicated to me that this would become present on the earth at a later time. These arephi crystalsof a high caliber and were transformed with the aid of theAmatrix Angels, working with the earth’s souls in order for this world to receive the full measure of the PHI frequency, preparing us for the New Earth Star harmonic.

(futher)

Thoth has “opened the scroll” to me on the progression of the crystalline matrix developing in the region of Lake Titicaca. It is now beginning to effect other crystalline deposits around the globe, creating a stronger “Phi” resonance within these deposits.One of the key crystalline deposits it is “charging” are the famous giant selenite crystals of the Naica mine in Mexico.As these crystals build in Phi frequency, they will ignite the entire planetary crystalline grid and more and more crystalline deposits will turn into Phi crystals, including crystals already mined – although these will be fewer, since they are physically cut off from their matrix. However, even those severed from the mother matrix can become Phi through charging them to the Amaru Seeding matrix and also other means, depending upon the energy of the individual crystal, it’s current environment and the care and use of the crystal by the individual. As the power of the “Phi” moves and builds in the actual overall crystalline grid of the planet, so the work of the Amatrix Angels is escalated in the re-genesis of planet earth.

From the center of the planet, up through theroil point of the earth– the Hawaiian Islands – and out through the light code tendrils of the hagia, the new geometries of crystalline light formation, will occur the transfiguration of the Old Earth paradigm into the New Earth Hologram. “Seed particles” of future ambiance will erupt along the crystalline edges of the Old Earth grids, opening these grids to new life form communion with Numis’OM – the first stage of the New Earth Star. The “new life forms” will at first be the Lotus Loci, who are forming also within our DNA and cellular structure NOW. Thus a kindredship will rapidly develop of various levels of receipt between the New Earth and it’s species and it’s kindred, here in the Old Earth (within the DNA), creating a “launching pad” into Numis’OM.

The escalation of geologic activity at the roil point (June of 2007) and the disappearance through a fissure of an entire lake in Chile are just two of the dramatic signals nesting within the 5th World prophecies of the Maya.

There is also the return of the outer earth atmosphere ice canopy beginning to re-form! Thoth reveals to me that this re-formation of the outer ice canopy is coming from the crystalline grid’s new infusion of “phi” out of the Amaru Seeding. The outer ice canopy re-formation will accellerate the “charge” of the crystalline connection between the inner and out earth, uniting them for the earth ascension process into the New Earth Star.

~~~~~~~~~~~~

In September of 2018 I enter the Thothic Stream to find out more about the Naica Selenite matrix of crystals…

Prior to the phi charging of this matrix, these Selenite crystals – the entire matrix and not just the currently explored caves – contain Light Language fire encodements of our entire Galatic Radius. The “Galactic Radius” the Thothi Record informs me, is The full Metatronic Light Spetrum of our Crystal-Light Universal Hologram. All that “we” are as a planetary Radiance, is generated and defined within our Galactic Radius.

The Naica Selenite matrix is part of the largerSerpentine Crystal Fire Matrix.This SCFM seeds and fires up thePyramidis Radius Matrix (PRM). The two dance togetther as spiraling strands of DNA. The SCFM is the crystalline field, while the PRM is the platform for Ascension dynamics…the station between Old and New Earth systemic functions.

So let us look at Selenite as a crystal for a moment. According to Thothandother sources, Selenite is the most refined elementation of etheric crystal. Thoth states that it acts as asubsuvial membranefor the energy flow of the planet. While all crystals can record sound, Selenite transforms sound and all vibration into 8th Octave frequencies. This allows whatever vibration entiering the Selenite to communicate back 8th Octave High Resonance Frequencies (8OHRF) into the reciever’s field.

As an example: If you chant into a piece of Selenite, it will “play back” into your energy field the higher frequency equvilent 8th Octave Harmonic. Yet it is not just about vibration. Thought intention is boosted into manifestational harmonics as well! Because Selenite is an “angelic frequency” crystal, it cannot be mis-used. It bends only to the highest Light commands.

In combination with other crystals and energy components, Selenite dances beautifully, enhancing gracefully all Light Programs.



Returning to my visit with Leela Hutchinson…

After our initital visit, Leela left with me a Selentie slab from the Naica crystal matrix. I at first was guided to place it under the Sinai fragments. Then for awhile under the Selenite Sword of Light. However, for the duration of the night, it was to go under the central ancient Jade skull, which comes from a shrine in Tibet. The skull Thoth calls HOLOS, and is the Guardian of the Osiris Arising crystal skull matrix.

Sometime in the night, I saw in my inner eye, blue lines of light coming through the skull and through the Selenite slab beneath it. It seemed like irridescent blue liquid light streams. Somewhat like beads of water running down a windowpane.

These streams were forming something. I saw crystal skulls being created by these irridescent blue streams. When I asked what I was viewing, Thoth revealed instantly to me that these were new crystal skulls forming….72 of them!

The information then began to flood my senses.

These “new” 72 were crystalline receiver vessels for 72 souls who had never incarnated in the World System I Earth. They were in the original LOTUS, but never descended. They now are coming through to interact with the 72 Dweller Crystal Skulls. They are joing with them to form the alliance needed to activate the 144 thousand Light Wave through the Vault of Osiris beneath the Temple of the Risen One (Great Pyramid). This “Light Wave” is an essential connection for the whole Ascension Dynamic of “Osiris” performing theStar Fire Kachina Dance.

So now with the Osiris Arising Project, we have a 144 full compliment of Crystal Skulls, registering the 144 Thousand Petaled Lotus Light Wave!

I requeste of Thoth, a name for these 72 “new” skulls. They are not “Dwellers” so what might I call them for referencing? He guided me to call them Ra*Star Crystal Skulls. As I read my information on the RA*STAR I found the following. I have highlighted in RED passages that I feel reveal what I was seeing with the blue irridescent streams flowing through the Selenite slab on my altar, and some current relevant notations.



From a 1999 Thothic Transmission

The Great Pyramid on the Giza plateau of Egypt is a multi-dimensional entity in stone. It has many functions and sacred programs of Light inserted within it. This structure, which we call the “Temple of the Risen One,” is supported in its multi-dimensional work by the other temple-pyramids on the Giza Plateau (the Temple of the Oracle and the Temple of the Fifth World), which we refer to as the “Solar Table.”

In this transmission, we address only one facet of the mighty crystal that is the Temple of the Risen One and its complex on the Solar Table. Yet this is a vital facet to the current age of humanity and the portal through which the planet is traveling into the “beyond” of a greater world–that of the “New Earth Star” ascended reality.

In the stone structure of the Temple of the Risen One (Great Pyramid), are meridians which carry rays or impulses of consciousness. These meridians we will call “star paths,” for the ancients called them “the shadow-halls of the stars.” They knew from even more distant legend, that the “Star Lords” had placed “long-shadows” of the cosmic beings (stars) across the Temple of the Risen One. These “shadows” had opened halls or paths in the stone for the soul to travel. The star paths then, are consciousness streams programmed by super-intelligence into the stone of the Great Pyramid. They are not the “air” shafts (which serve other purposes), but invisible highways of Light-intelligence cris-crossing deep within the stone.

At certain points of linear time in the earth, specific star paths are activated. By this we mean that they begin to send their consciousness streaming into the collective consensual reality of the planet. In this way, all human souls may benefit through the stimulation of their own spiritual intelligence in areas of thought which are resonant to the consciousness contained in the activated star paths of the Great Pyramid. In the past, many inventions, discoveries and other breakthroughs in awareness in the world have transpired as a result of the activation of the star paths in the library of stone which is the Temple of the Risen One. By this, we do not claim that ALL breakthroughs in great thought on earth are a result of the star path activation in the Great Pyramid. Again, this is only one facet in the greater crystal of earth-cosmic consciousness. The greater picture is far more complex, for this function within the Great Pyramid-Temple is only one part of a greater whole.

The earth is now coming upon a series of intense activations of star paths in the Great Pyramid. The activations occur with or soon after solar flares and other cosmic alignments,as well through direct releases of seals(an example being theO’pah sealsreleased on the VT of 2004)over consciousness zones in the earth by the universal hierarchy. Once the initial activations occur, the next stage is the transference of the consciousness codes contained within the star paths into the planetary consciousness. This is often a much slower and convoluted procedure due to the fractured reality in which earth’s kind currently dwells. In this transmission, we are purposing a means for individuals in the “Age of Communication” to engage and aid in the transference of these star path activations into the planetary consciousness in a way that would benefit their world.

We will give you a series of numbers that arepsionicallysensitive in the particular orders in which we will reveal them. The numbers in these specific orders will be accompanied by certain symbols which will further “specify” their frequency. These number codes are access points for the star path consciousness. If you feel so guided to participate, all of you who receive these number codes, may utilize them in the following ways:

1) Before you go to sleep at night, mentally “send” these number codes into the planetary consciousness field, simply by forming an intention that this is what you are accomplishing.

2) Place these number codes into a file on your computer (simply save this page to a special location where it won’t get deleted).

3) Send these number codes through the Internet to others via e-mail.(2018 note: also through social media)

4) Place these number codes on websites.

Understand that as these number codespass throughor areheld inthe electronic medium of the Internet, so they become extremely sensitive to the planetary consciousness grid. By sending and holding these codes in the worldwide electronic system, they form aLight patternthat serves as an integrational field for passing star path quantums of consciousness into the planetary mind.

The numbers and identification symbols are as follows:

447689001: six silver bands of light surrounding a golden egg

380905224: a blue lotus flower suspended in the starry vault of Orion

105802291: a white rose as seen from directly above the center point of its full blossom, containing 72 petals with a diamond at the point of each petal

778540211: the Emerald Tablet of Thoth radiating fire letters of gold from the polished surface of the emerald stone

Although the physical capstone of the Great Pyramid was destroyed (all but the gold plates containing the circuitry codes which were once inside the physical capstone), the greater geometry of Light from which the Great Pyramid’s capstone was an elemental duplication still exists. This greater geometry capstone we call the “Capstone of JERICHO.” We, of the Chariot of the Sun (the merkabah of 2,197 [13×13] souls which is itself capstoned by Thoth), have inserted a Light program into the Capstone of JERICHO which will greatly facilitate the integration of the star paths within the Temple of the Risen One into the planetary consciousness grid. We are choosing to call this Light program “Ra*Star 2000.” A brief description of this Light program is as follows:

RA*STAR 2000 is a hierarchically generated planetary “oversoul” which allows earth’s humanity to work within a stabilized consciousness bridge to the New Earth Star future ascended reality of earth. Using the Ra*Star 2000, this bridging will be able to take place in the midst of the increasingly distorted sacred geometries of the Old Earth reality. The distortion of these Old Earth sacred geometries will be increasing as the planet moves through themagnetic solar, magnetic planetaryand other cosmic influences which are beginning to effect the planet in very tangible ways, and will continue to do so into the future right up to the point of planetary ascension. The Ra*Star 2000 Light program creates a new geometry bridge or oversoul, so that humanity can work with BOTH forms (OLD and NEW) and not become entirely enmeshed in the warping effect which causes the distortion.

“The shadow-halls open to the Initiate who walks the star-way. It is he who quickens the womb of fire in the hallows of the earth and responds to the soul of time.”~ Thoth Raismes of Aphra

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

From around 2002

The Ra*Star Vault is composed of 7 Octaves culminating in the Perfect Harmonic of the 8th Sphere.

Thothic Names for the Seven Octaves (chosen from an ancient High Mayan star cosmology):1)Zumal (Heart Stone)

2)Chikopal (Mirror)

3)Tiranak (Dwelling Light)(2018 note: Perfect Harmonic Octave of the Dweller Crystal Skulls)

4)Abzim (Seven Stars/Pleadies)

5)Sokum (World Mountain or Middle Foundation)

6)Chaktum (Morning Flower or Unfolding Flower)

7)Raza ( Life-Giver or Altar Fire)

The 8th Sphere:The Divine Harmonic of the Seven. According to the High Mayan cosmology above, the 8th Sphere is Khal – The Fullness.(2018 note: Octave / Sphere of the Ra*Star Crystal Skulls / Beings)

When I wrote out the 7 High Mayan interpretations of the octaves, I do so spontaneously. Only after I had written them down, did I compare them with Rowena’s 7 Octave Co-Creation version. I personally was struck by the harmony between these two archtypifications.

The vault of what we are calling the Ra*Star dynamic feeds into the earth through 11spinner fieldnomes (composed oftetranomes)with a 12th acting as a flash point, transforming its entire field into a new set of 11/12 nomes, and so on into an infinite number. The whole nome process running through the 7 octave field is operative within the DNA as well as the greater universe on all levels. It represents thechannels or veinswithin the hyper-drive of the universe which allows the most basic level of “Light Language” communication throughout the universe. There are other, greater levels in operations as well. However it is this basic level that I am feeling guided to address from this specific format or understanding that I am in touch with at present.

The “engine” of the Ra*Star dynamic (the 7 octave / 8th sphere….11 nomes / 12th flashpoint) are the atomas which exist at the center of all DNA/cells/organisms/living beings/planets/stars/galaxies, etc.). The nome “veins spread like cracks on ice when generated by the atomas. When the hyper-drive reaches “critical absorption” in the system in which it is chain-reacting, The skater falls through the ice, ie, the flashpoint occurs creating a “blue” hole. A blue hole differs from a black hole in that the former is responsive to specific conscious control, whereas a black hole is not. A blue hole also contains large hyper-electrical charges of “First Matter” fire, whereas a black hole consumes all energy. Once the skater is plummeted through the blue hole he is then thrown into the “water” — a new plane of experience. This process is duplicated again and again, but each time the blue hole is achieved much more rapidly, until it moves beyond space-time. Relative to the Ra Star dynamic, I am intuitively calling the movement or change into “beyond space-time”, Theta. Once the Light Language moves through the nome hyperspace veins, reaches flashpoint, the blue hole opens up, swallowing the Light and the “Language” then moves into Theta and “communes” with all systems in the universe.



September of 2018

Returning to my visit with Leela, she left in my temporary guardianship, a large pillar of Selenite from a mine in Morocco. It is one of two which she has used for many years in working with (what Thoth is calling) the Serpentine Crystal Fire Matrix. Leela told me that she received I was the “Lady of the White Stone.” She explained that this “Lady” was a metafor for a function – my holding this position in some kind of activiational way for the part of the SCFM of the San Luis Valley.

~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~~~~~~~~

Journey to the Dunes for Ceremony – 9/06/18



~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

In the sci-fi movie VALERIAN I was struck by the resemblence of the people of the planet Mul with the Andarans I had seen, and now the Ra*Star Beings, who come from the LOTUS Reality of Earth – the  seeding ground for our “future” New Earth Star. Yes, they also resemble the Navi of AVATAR. But I saw the Andarans before either movie was made. (“saw” in my inner sight)





~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

---

## Article 414: Telos.Aakhara & the Lion-Headed Sun Lords


Telos.Aakhara & the Lion-Headed Sun Lords

(excerpted from Issue 1&2 – 1993 of Temple Doors, which is available toKyi’Ra Portalmembers in the Vault of Thoth)

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

THOTH:Telos.Aarkhara is a tele-plane repository for synergistic systems operating between the Three Universes, and thus the Three MLs. First, we shall define these terms for you: Tele-plane is a dimensional ‘moving Selah’. It is a point of definition or centering that is not stationary in time-space, but moves between subjective realities. It teleports information from one reality to another. This is a natural condition very necessary to support the universal continuum. There are many tele-planes. (although this one is of major distinction and importance – see ‘Omnicron’ and ‘Heliomar’ later in this text –Maia) Three Universes ( 3 UNI ) are the three types of reality structuring. Many years ago you were given more specific information on this, so in this study we will limit our definition to the above statement. These three matrixes define the laws of space and time as well as inter-dimensional interaction. Three Millenniums we have given you much information on as well, so we will simply say here that these are the three fields of time event that are intrinsically one, yet have become separated karmically in the course of human destiny. These three MLs are confined to the Earth’s realities and not universal in nature. Telos.Aarkhara is, as we said, a repository, which is positioned on the teleplane linking various realities related to Earth’s ‘scroll’ or spiritual time progression. It forms synergetic connections between: Cydonia on Mars, which we call the ‘Dwelling Place of Lords”; the Great Pyramid complex in Egypt – Temples of the Lion; the Rennes in France, the Cornerstone of Knebir in what is known historically as Ninevah; The Chamber of the Seven Seals in the Sinai; and now that the gates have been opened, it can once again access the ascended Isle of Ruta. TA accesses all sacred centers of Earth, but these are the major templates which connect and feed through it. (Easter Island is ‘terminator’ on Earth – more in this text.)

Question:You say that it is a ‘repository’. What does this repository store?

THOTH:The Light mathematics harmonics for the Hierarchical Plan of Earth. It is difficult to put into words you would be able to understand at this point. But it is in essence, the codings for the Doctrine of Signature of Earth. It might be easier to comprehend it musically. A piece of classical music would contain instructions throughout, telling the musician how to express the notes as he plays them. The symphony of Earth has these ‘instructions’ as well, which are contained in the Telos.Aarkhara. It was created in the 1st ML by the Melchizedekian Lords. Its prime threshold and activator into your 2nd ML dimension is located at Cydonia – the Dwelling Place of the Lords. Within TA, resonates the codings for the DNA Crystallex of Earth’s life forms. From this crystellex arises the definitions of the cycles of mankind’s Time on Earth before the ascension of the planet (LP-40), which are 20 in number. You find yourselves within the 19th cycle now. These can be found accurately represented in the Mayan Star-Glyphs, which are 20 in number. They are arranged sequentially correct in The Mayan Oracle. Thus, the world finds itself now under the Star Shield of CAUAC: purification, transformation, reunion, light body, activation for ascension, thunderbeing, lightening path, initiation by fire, and ecstasy of freedom. The Totem Being is the White Owl, with the thundercloud and lightening being symbols of empowerment. Royal Purple is the color. The most vibrationally accurate crystal is sugilite, and the element is water. The meditation and affirmation given The Mayan Oracle is entirely appropriate for this 19th Cycle:

“Enter the wave of ecstasy beyond the finite dance of the swirling veils. Fragments of the Greater Self gather, moving homeward. Rise up unveiled. Horizons await. “

“I am purifying and transforming myself, igniting my light body, healing all separation.”

Question:William Buehler’s people channeled years ago that the Earth was in its 19th cycle. William has figured it out according to the time it takes the planet to progress through the entire zodiac as being divided into units of 25.826 calendar years per cycle. This would mean that the fist cycle began around ½ million years ago, which fits the geometrics of Richard Hoagland’s work on the age of the Face of Cydonia. How do you measure these cycles? TH/SUN: According to your calendar, William is very close to accuracy. Its most arcane measurement would fall within the atmic (not atomic) rotation of the crystalline force field within the DNA Crystallex. The numeric on this is 223.45000 arcs – that is 3,000 atmic rotations per 1 millionth of a second. Every 3,000 years the direction of the rotation reverses. When the M-STRA molecule reaches its full Metatronic access within the man form once again, the atmic rotation will slow so that the M-STRA can nova within the cellular system, creating the Pure Gem meta-form. This will free human kind from the karmic field entirely. It is important also, to work with the consciousness of the 20th cycle, which is found in the 3rd ML. It is under the Star Shield of AHAU, the Star-Glyph of Metatron: union, wholeness, ascension, unconditional love, solar mastery, Christ consciousness, language of Light, ecstasy, limitless bliss, crown. The color is Gold, and stones the most resonate are crystals, amber (a vegetable crystal), golden topaz and yellow sapphire. The Totem is the white dove, and the empowerment symbols are the Sun itself, and crown chakra, which is the human body’s doorway to the Metatron. the common Mayan usage of ‘Ahau’ is lord, ruler and flower. It’s element is fire, and the meditation/affirmation is: “The same golden bird that dwells in the human heart dwells in the Sun, I am a child of the light, crowned with the self-authority and transparency of the divine child I know myself to be.”

(Dolphin Masters – embodied in certain dolphins)bring the soul to the font of the Threshold into multi-reality or freedom from linear being. Once inside, it is the Lion Ones who are Keepers of the Repository, and they are facilitators of the DWELLER CRYSTAL SKULLS. The Metatron Skulls (from among the Dwellers, which we told you had not yet been brought to Earth), are now contained in a pyramid of the Dwelling Place of the Lords (Cydonia on Mars). It is for this reason that the man-face of Mars can be revealed to contain the Lion Face of Sirius, for the Sirians are the facilitators of the Selah or Ulta point of your Universe.

(The statues of Easter Island)These forms are the Iktiti that the Sirians set to guard their prime chamber on that island. The Telos.Aarkhara’s central terminator on Earth is at Easter Island. The ‘terminator’ is likened unto an Aaronrod, linking the Mars Kobol with the Earth Kobol. The actual construction of the buildings and geometrics of Cydonia and other structures on Mars(most of them) were accomplished by the Master Builders of Orion.The Cydonia complex is under the charge of the ‘Belt’ stars.(Maia: In a 2018 transmission I was shown that the Belt Stars of Orion are the “Gateway Stars” through which we receive the “translation of our Universe” from the Trapezium of the Orion Nebula.)

THOTH:The Krystos are a blend of Pashat Lion Ones and the Crystal People. They work in guardian capacity involving the exchange of energy between the mineral and animal kingdom, specifically as received and exchanged through the lattices of crystal. The Zumir are created from the Pashat and the human-type race of Sirius. Sirius contains three race forms and thus Race Spirits: human/lion (cat)/reptile. They are each within their own dimension, but at certain nodes can interact. They are all of a positive energy field. There is the element of Redemption involved, however, as they are a part of the Fire received through the Fallen Gate. Yet, this Fire is in of itself, a pure flame. Menon was/is a Pashat/Egyptian (this includes a certain amount of ‘Blue Star’ Rigel genetics as well). He was genetically engineered. Beyond the Fallen Gate that the Pashat guard (as they among the Three-Fold are the Guardians of this Gate), you will find the Lords of Twilight. But, there is another realm. It is within the 1st ML and it is more ancient than any other creation realm in the universe. It is the Heliomar. This is the realm that contains the ‘Eye of Ra’, flung into the Abyss by Set. The Heliomar is the Eye of Ra. The Archetype Sekhmet, the LionOne, is the Vanquisher/Declarer /Deliverer of the Eye of Ra. She is the other half of Hathor, the Receiver/Imparter/Reconciler, whose Temple City adorned the mountain then known by the Egyptians as Hathormetis, in the Sinai. It is not the mountain of Moses’ encounter with the Burning Bush or the Ark of the Covenant. Both these sacred events occurred on Mt. Sinai as it is identified today. But, it was at Hathormetis that Menon was the Master Priest in his labyrinth beneath the temple. He was the Hidden Priest. Returning to Heliomar, this is the realm beneath the ‘Footrest of the Lord’ (the Fallen Gate). It is not part of the Abyss of Fallen Light. It is isolated from all time and space, and therefore not in contradiction with either Light or Darkness. It is the Center of the Throne, the missing Gem of the Crown of Lucifer, and as we have said, the Eye of Ra (RA-SOLIS, OSIRIS HORUS). In the Heliomar, there are the Lion-Forms we shall call Krystos and the Zumir. They are more Devic-Angelic. The domestic cats, the large cats and most supremely the Lion, are devic manifestations of these greater forms, stemming through the Pashats to the SUNLORDS. Remember, that ALL IS ONE. Thus, a human form, a Lion form, and even a reptilian form are all part of the same energy. The SUNLORDS work with interdimensional fields to supply the center Gemstone ray uniting the Three Crucibles, 1st, 2nd, and 3rd MLs. The Lion-Ones are always guardians, whether it is of Knowledge, Wisdom, Elementals, or Time. They are also, in certain capacity, Guardians of the Human Race. When working with the AYIN H’RENISIS, the SUNLORD Lion Ones are those you must turn to, to lead you through the Path of Fire, for they dwell between the Flame and the Lance, the Hammer and the Anvil. They know the path between. It was not necessary for the PENTADOVE voyagers to be instructed of this, for their journey is of the Redeemed Light through the awakening of the Dove from the center of the Golgotha Skull. The journey of the Ayin H’Renisis is one of releasing the seals on the Fallen Gate. It is the difference between the Dove and the Lion.

THE TELOS.AARKHARA:Thoth explains that there is a major divine core of energy and consciousness that was seriously ‘ruptured’ in the Fall, resulting in the engramming of the Lucifer Coil in the energetic. The Telos.Aarkhara is an artifact, not a natural event, that was built to contain the rupture and Lucifer Coil until it could be transmuted. Access to the TELOS.AARKHARA is being much expanded for a wider range of human interaction. Not only are old links being reestablished between the City of the Lords, the Ayhar (Rennes) and Alta Ru (Holy Isle of Ruta) but there is a newformat being installed.(This all as of 1994)

Ruta exists on the ‘tear’ in the universe of the ‘Big Bang’. When it was sucked through the etheric tear of this planets’ reality (Borah). It went into ‘orbit’ so to speak around the larger, universal tele-plane tear (Omnicron). Through it be seen at certain times an elliptic brilliant point from which the violet light is emitted. It is on the Omnicron that the Telos.Aarkhara is positioned.

Stones of Power

Before continuing, please read my recent article onTribelight:

The Thothic Record on Smart Meters

## Article 416: The OPHRA of the King’s Chamber


The OPHRA of the King’s Chamber



(image: Maia & Simeon facilitating process in the King’s Chamber in 1997)

~~~~~~~~~~~~

The video below came to my attention today. The theory brought forward is that the famous hole bored by Caliph Al-Ma’mun in the 9th century, into the upper chambers of the Great Pyramid of Giza is not from the outside in, but theinside out!My inner-planes mentor ThothHorRa concurs.

The possible reason for this mentioned in the video is that the hole was bored in order to take something out of the chamber too big for the regular passageway. Again, Thoth agrees.

At first, it is considered that since the lid of the sarcophagus in the King’s Chamber is missing, this is what was brought out. However, the question is proffered, that this item was simply not valuable enough for all the effort. It is then speculated it may have been the Ark of the Covenant – perhaps within the King’s Chamber, that was brought out. This is where Thoth disagrees.

He then referred me back to a transmission I received from him in 1983. it is a description of the LID of the so-called sarcophagus in the King’s Chamber:

So the lid of the “Orpha” was indeed the valuable item taken from the King’s Chamber!

A Puzzeling Footnote:When I recently made a reading and discussion video for mysubscription portal– entitledThoth Speaks: The Great Pyramid & the Hall of Records, I read from one of my hard copies of “THE SOURCE” in which this transmission appears. When I came to the passage quoted above, it read “the Queen’s Chamber.” I remember thinking to myself at the time, that Ithoughtit was the King’s Chamber. But there it was in black and white, so I went ahead and read it that way.

Just today, I looked it up in the PDF version.It says the King’s Chamber.Just as I had remembered it. But the hardcopy says the Queen’s Chamber! VERY odd, as I did not write it twice. However, King’s Chamber it truly is!

The Ophra devise atop the King’s box when found by the Caliph, was not entirely in tact. The main operational system had been removed for safe-keeping. It was still nonetheless pretty impressive to look at, and quite valuable in it’s metallic and gem properties.

The Queen’s Chamber

No box in this! Assumed to symbolize a place for the Ka of the King’s soul; but no. It also had an interesting array within it, positioned in the niche seen in the photograph below.



The device here was set up differently, but did have some basic similar properties. It was meant to work in tandem with the “King’s Box.” Perhaps I will receive more about it at a future time.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~

I came across the following on the web. I have highlighted in RED my particular interest in this article. I received from the Thoth Akasha years ago that the Great Pyramid was originally called the Temple of the Risen One. Of course this whole site here – The Osiris Arising Project – is keyed into the Great Pyramid as being a Temple of Ascension. Certainly true in various ways, of many ancient pyramids.

- web source

~~~~~~~~~~~~~

THE VIDEO (first mentioned in this article)

https://youtu.be/I68AF5PVLgQ
