---

## Article 895: Return of the Magdalens – The Templars and the Grail


Return of the Magdalens – The Templars and the Grail



A chapter from Grand Commander Michael Henry’s soon-to-be-published book, FROM THE GOLD TO THE GODDESS.  Reprinted here with his permission.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

CHAPTER TWENTY-SEVEN – RETURN OF THE MAGDALENS – THE TEMPLARS AND THE GRAIL(An Excerpt from “From the Gold to the Goddess – The True Story of the Restoration of Chivalry and The Return of the Knights Templar,” by Michael Henry Dunn, copyright 2018, all rights reserved).

As Prince Matthew and I labored together on the growth of the restored Templar Order in the years 2013-15, we both saw that we were doing what might be called (in the cosmic scheme of things) “Boy’s Club” work. We were building the container, restoring the structure, focusing on legitimacy of lineage and full restoration of the scholarly, archaeological, canonical, chivalric, and esoteric heritage of the original Order of the Knights Templar. It felt like “masculine” work – if one may generalize within the parameters of problem-solving in a linear and legally-oriented struggle against some formidable opposing forces – in other words, it felt like a kind of war.

That was fine with us – particularly, it was fine with Prince Matthew, as his whole life and training and extraordinary gifts had prepared him for exactly this masculine role of builder and defender. As for me, while I am perhaps more conciliatory by nature than Matthew, I have always been fine with a fight when the cause was right.

But we both knew that without the grace of an incoming stream of authentic Divine Feminine energy and wisdom, the restored Templar Order would be an empty shell, ready to blow away in the first strong wind.

And we knew a storm was coming.

Matthew was frank about this with me early on. “I’m great with theories about the Divine Feminine, Michael,” he confessed one day. “I can give you all kinds of second-hand wisdom and in-depth esoteric citations of the interplay of the alchemical energies of masculine and feminine as they seek balance in the soul. But personally, my history is not great in that department on the experiential level. You’re the one who gets it.”

I had a startling demonstration of this one day. Before my long-time lady friend and I parted ways, she had taken part in early discussions with Prince Matthew and me on the unfolding growth of the Order. At the same time, as a friend, I had confided in Matthew about some of the difficulties in my relationship with her. One day in an email (on which I was copied) she shared with him her thoughts about “Magdalen energies” and the role of a true Mary Magdalene dynamic in human relationship. Matthew’s national security intelligence super-computer brain kicked in, and he delivered an authoritative and stunning Templar Grand Master lecture in response on the spectacular absence of true Magdalen compassion, support, and unconditional love which he saw as missing in her treatment of me.

I remember driving down Ventura Boulevard that day in the San Fernando Valley, stopped at a red light as I glanced down at my cell phone to read this devastating lecture from Prince Matthew to the woman in my life. As when I had first seen my name hit the big time in the alternative media two years before, I groaned the same words.

“Oh, jeez – I’m toast.”

So, yes, one might say that Prince Matthew has an admirable and profound grasp of the theoretical dynamics of masculine/feminine inter-relationship – and is not perhaps the best person to send to bat in a delicate romantic context.

I am telling no tales out of school here, as (in my mind) I can hear him laughing at the truth in the above paragraph.

So it was, to some extent, left to me to reach out to those women who were waiting somewhere in the wings to bring to the restored Order the blessed energy of the Templars’ beloved Protectress, St. Mary Magdalene, the perfect example of devotion and attunement and divine partnership.

And now, in the 21st century, we could do this openly. Today, in the absence of Church persecution, there is no longer the need for secrecy, or for cloaking reverence for the Feminine in the gorgeous subterfuge of the Arthurian tales, of the mystic power of the Holy Grail, of the Sacred Quest taken in the name of the Lady Fair. Now the Templar role could shift toward open advocacy of the beautiful task of perfecting the divine alchemy within the soul, while restoring the Divine Feminine to balance in the world without.

Easier said than done.

I could hardly place a personals ad on Craigslist: “Wanted: authentic Magdalene souls, steeped in genuine priestess-training, free of delusional grandiosity, sincerely dedicated to humble service to humanity and the Divine, ready to assist in balancing the inner alchemy of the lineally restored Order of the original Knights Templar. Compensation: nil. Benefits: highly intangible.”

On second thought, maybe I should have placed that ad. I would likely have gotten some intriguing responses! It reminds me of what the monks at the monastery used to tell potential recruits who would ask about “retirement plans” if one became a monk.

“Well,” they’d quip, “The retirement plan is basically an urn at Forest Lawn Mortuary. And the benefits are out of this world!”

So I reflected that since Spirit had brought me this far, on a bizarre adventure to Indonesia as a means of connecting me with the restored Templars, that She could be trusted to eventually lead me (though assuredly not in a straight line) to those souls who were destined to help infuse the restored Templars with the indispensable Feminine balance.

Prince Matthew often told me that the primary mission of the Order is to draw and assist those authentic Templar souls who have long been pursuing a “knightly quest” throughout their lives, and who spontaneously recognize in the restored Order the support, wisdom, and brother/sisterhood they have long been seeking – without quite knowing where to find it, or even if it truly existed.

All I could do, in the end, was follow my intuition while praying I would not go too badly astray – which is my customary modus operandi in any case.

There were, of course, some serious missteps and wrong choices. The world is full of striving souls at various levels of evolution, incarnated in bodies female and male, in whom the balance of those energies is often in upheaval in this time of gender confusion and persecution. There are millions who recognize in their own souls the yearning to step up into a role of spiritual leadership, of teaching and counseling, of “shamanic” or priestess work. They see the suffering of humanity and of Nature herself in this time of crisis, and longing for a life of meaning and contribution, such souls often have no choice but to become “self-anointed” celebrants or ministers, as the patriarchal world of “legitimate” ordination is frequently closed to them within their own traditions.

I will not go into detail about those tangents and missteps we made (which I myself made) in seeking to draw authentic women spiritual leaders – true priestesses in a “higher” Magdalen lineage (not necessarily a formal one) – into the Templar stream. I am grateful to those who gave of their time and wisdom as we grew, and I honor their lives and their work.

One such soul, who shall remain nameless (though she knows who she is), was truly a “web-weaver” in the highest sense at a crucial moment. For through her intuition and guidance, I was led (just in time) to the unique energies and soul tribes of Crestone, Colorado, and through her I was introduced to long-forgotten friends of other lives who have now become my dearest compatriots and dedicated Templar brothers and sisters. Through those introductions – and the further divine bridges made from those souls to still others in their tribes – the first Templar Priories of the new stream have been gathered and consecrated…the first in 700 years.

Through her I met perhaps the greatest Templar sage now alive – the Reverend William Buehler, U.S. Navy Commander (retired), who with his partner Dame Edie Cooper, serves as Prior of the Templar Priory of the Ark of Ascension – a unique and quietly powerful community of souls under Rev. Buehler’s guidance, which focuses on deep Light work utilizing the Reshel Grid spiritual technology – a truly ancient Templar system which works with the energetic bloodstream of the Earth itself embodied in the grids and ley lines which encircle the planet to facilitate the long-term spiritual evolution or “Ascension” of humanity. From Chartres Cathedral to Notre Dame to Rosslyn Chapel to the Abbey of Clairvaux – and on to the energetic “seeding” of the grids of North America in the pre-Columbian Templar voyages to Oak Island and Newport – Bill and Edie’s profound mission works quietly and humbly with both global and universal angelic energies in a way that few can detect, but from which all will benefit.

In turn, through Rev. Buehler, I met three other astonishing spiritual leaders, all of whom are now Templar Dames and Priory leaders, all of whom had long been on their own quests, doing the humble work of self-evolution, while teaching and leading their own communities: such as the truly gifted and humble Dame Prioress Maia Kyi-Ra Nartoomid of the Templar Priory of the White Stone, whose some fifty years of attunement with angelic wisdom has led to an astonishing library of esoteric knowledge, touching on healing, the hidden history of planet Earth, the destiny of souls, and the irresistible dynamic of accelerated spiritual evolution now referred to as “Ascension.”

Through Dame Maia, I met the leader of the Order of the Sovereign Grail Queens, the brilliant Dame Prioress Alison McLean, whose Scottish heritage long ago led her to deeply study the Templar heritage in her ancestral homeland, and whose courage and keen intuition led her to gather a sisterhood of brave women who strive to reclaim and embody the sovereign Queenship of the feminine soul – now, too, a Templar Priory.

Within this same magic circle, I was introduced to my dear friend Dame Raven Sinclaire – also, as it happens, of authentic Scottish Sinclaire heritage – whose life-long work of intuitive guidance and healing led to the founding of what is now a thriving community of Magdalen priestesses based in the Smoky Mountains of western North Carolina, where the Templar Priory of the Magdalen Temple of Ascension has its home. Dame Raven’s blend of incisive wisdom with effortless Southern charm lends a light-hearted gaiety to a community which unabashedly faces down the darkest depths in the human psyche.

Dame Alison and Dame Raven now serve on the Grand Mastery council of the Templar Order, helping to guide the unfolding of the Templar missions, and forming, with Templar Dame Baroness Robyn David (the Grand Marshall of the Order) a balance of Divine Feminine to Sacred Masculine within the Templar leadership.

The lingering image of the Templars is of a white knight on horseback, a bright red Templar Cross Paté on his chest, his face obscured by his helmet, his bloody sword or battle-axe raised in furious conflict, facing a savage foe – who is always a Muslim. That male-dominated brotherhood was of those centuries, and the restoration was destined to transcend it.

That warrior image was always misleading in any case, in light of the Templars’ true lineage and of the mission of spiritual upliftment which long predates the founding of the medieval Order. The Crusader wars were what we might call the Templars’ “day job” in an era of geopolitical conflict rooted in religious division and misunderstanding. It was predestined that the medieval expression of the ancient Templar stream would have a rise and a fall – and that the work would nevertheless go on, beyond the brutal suppression of that fatal Friday the 13th in 1307.

The inner circle of Templar esoteric knowledge – now expressed in today’s beautiful Priories – was always concerned with the higher spiritual knowledge anchored in meditation, prayer, and working with the sacred energies of the Earth, while seeking divine guidance.

This is the famous “Second Rider” expressed in the old Templar symbol of the two knights on one horse: the inner mystical work of this second rider is one essential element, while the outer work, the First Rider, the human rights and refugee aid missions of today, brings this sacred knowledge into meaningful impact in the outer world. Together, they make Chivalry not just a word, or an antiquated charming tale, but a vital and inspiring geopolitical force, a clarion call straight to the human heart, which sings the undying truth that, yes, just one striving soul can indeed make a difference in the great chaos now upon us.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

<!-- END ARTICLE: 895 -->

---

## Article 901: The Rosary Tree


The Rosary Tree

Last night, before I slept I saw very clearly in my mind’s eye a bush or small tree with rosaries hanging from it. Not only rosaries, but a few necklaces of religious medals.

I had never seen anything like it before. However Googling his morning I found many photographs of rosary trees! The only reason given was for “good weather” and yet I find it difficult to believe that all these many rosaries hanging from trees are for simply good weather.

I have quite a few rosaries, some especially made for my work with the crystal skulls. They have Christ, Mary, Buddha, and other aspects of God-Creator archetypes on them. I recently received a beautiful one especially made for me from my Dear Sistar and Friend, Pamela Minton.

I read a bit on this history of the rosary. No one seems to know for sure its origin. One theory is that it came through the Crusaders from the Middle East. From the Akasha I can validate this…as much as one can validate anything they receive from the Akasha lol. I do proceed further into the Akasha on this subject,following the rosary back to Atlantis, where crystal beads were used on a looped string to balance harmonics in the body. Each bead had been sonically tuned to emit a frequency when certain notes were either chanted or played on an instrument. The wearer of the crystal necklace would then experience a vibration of higher frequencies coming from the beads. The sounds in other words, trigger higher etheric cords to be released from the beads. These chords could not be heard but were felt in the body. Large crystals were used for “harmonic synthesis” as well – for many purposes, but the beads were more personal.

Eventually, crystal bead were employed as “signatures” for Master Beings. Certain temples dedicated to these Beings and communion with them, offered “attuning beads” which individuals then wore to connect them more specifically to a particular Master. These communion beads were not just doled out. One had to go through initiation stages in order to receive their special beads.

Returning to the question as to why I saw the tree or bush filled with rosaries, I am being shown that it is Templar connected. There seemed to be souls gathered around the tree, placing their rosaries and medallions upon it and praying for the World. I feel theTemplus Saratum– on the ascended Ruta Isle of Atlantis, calling upon souls to join them in this Vigil.

I AM ALSO FEELING THE CALL ASK ALL WHO READ THIS TO JOIN ME, IN PLACING YOUR CRYSTALLINE “ROSARY” FROM YOUR HEART OF HEARTS, UPON THE SACRED TREE OF LIFE. THUS, HOLDING VIGIL FOR THE WORLD.

PLEASE DO THIS FOR SEVEN NIGHTS IN A ROW…LONGER IF YOU WISH.

AND SO IT IS!

~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~~~~~~~~MY ROSARIES~~~~~~~~~~~







~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

PLEASE SUPPORT ALL THE FREE INFORMATION I OFFER ON THE INTERNET BYSUBSCRIBING TO MY KYI’RA PORTAL, PARTAKING OFMY SERVICESORDONATING TO MY NON-PROFITSET UP FOR THIS PURPOSE. The donation page allows you to choose recurring auto payments. Even a small recurring donation would be greatly appreciated.

TO RECEIVE ANNOUNCEMENTS ON ALL MY CURRENT STUFFSIGN UP ON MY MAILCHIMP LIST!

YOU CAN FIND THE LINKS TO ALL MY WEBS & BLOGS HERE

## Article 904: Remembering Templar William Stuart Buehler


Remembering Templar William Stuart Buehler

Willam Buehler transitioned on August 1st, 2018 at the age of 84. HE WILL BE GREATLY MISSED AND DEEPLY REMEMBERED.

Below is my Tribute video to him, which begins with the Cremation Ceremony held at dawn on August 4th on the outskirts of Crestone, Colorado.

But first a few notes:

I so wish I had captured more. Rob Williams opening tribute, and others who spoke.  I so enjoyed hearing from Bill’s son, about the “rocket ship” he built for them in the back yard!

Thanks to Celeste, as she contributed a few snippets of Edie and I speaking. I quite frankly, was not too capable in 3D as I became absorbed in the higher dimensions with this powerful ceremony! I did film while the Templar Chant was playing…filming blind, with the sun in my eyes.

I am standing sideways during my reading of the Thoth message, as otherwise, the sun would have been right in my eyes.

After the video, you will find the Thoth message, speaking on HIS friend, Sir William Stuart.

~~~~~~~~~~

https://youtu.be/h65tBgWFP2U

~~~~~~~~~~

Message from ThothHorRa

The soul of William Buehler has been working for the Great Cause of Restoration through many lifetimes. In these lifetimes, his Life Lesson has been to embrace humanity’s struggle in order to restore the Lost Codes. His incarnating soul is directly linked to the restoring of the Adam Kadmon, the template of the human species on Earth – its Fall and Rising. He thus has often assumed the mantle of the Wounded King. He who is inflicted by the suffering of the Land through his deep oath of restoring it.

It is his “Life Lesson” for only through one’s own life may the healing of the Earth and her kind be accomplished.

I Thoth, have witnessed this soul in the service of Spirit when I walked upon the Earth in several of my incarnations. He has been a comrade and friend. Now he shall rest and renew. A New Earth awaits him where the struggle is no more and the Great Work is within a realm of existence which calls upon his Soul to Shine.

As a Swan Knight, William continues to take up the Mantle for humanity’s plight, but now it comes from the Still Point of the Gate of Selah, where the Living Light reveals the truest Glory. In this realm, so the Swan Knight becomes the Knight of Glory, and all his Good Works come from the Heart of Pure Grace. In this way, his soul is relieved of the battle shield, his sword transforming into the Staff of the Shepherd.

THE MANTLE OF CHRISTOS SOPHIA IS UPON HIM.  NON NOBIS DOMINE

* * * * *

SEE VIDEO #2



<!-- END ARTICLE: 904 -->

line_start: 27266

tags: ['BLOOD Path', 'WHITE STONE', 'RED Roads', 'WHITE Roads', 'Path WHITE', 'Path', 'WHITE', 'BLOOD', 'Roads', 'STONE', 'Through', 'soul', 'RED', 'Earth', 'Presence']
---

## Article 905: The Two Roads


The Two Roads

This is a transmission from the 1990’s which I have often referenced since then. While it is in my archival Spirit Mythos site, I wished to place it here as well.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

(Thoth through Maia)

The Atlantean symbology for the Grail path of procreation was called the Red Road, or Blood Path. Their name for direct infusion of Grail consciousness into the genetic stream was known as the White Road, or Path of the White Stone. The White Stone is similar in principle to the Philosopher’s Stone, and in its most ancient understanding represents a ‘gleaming or ‘shining’ pillar of manifest Spirit; that is; Spirit turned outwardly into the manifest world without any violation of its Spirit’s higher truth.

The outer form of the White Road can be demonstrated in the life of the Christed Master Yeshua. His mere Presence on the earth infused it directly with the divine and altered the entire course of its spiritual evolution. In like manner, individuals souls currently embodied on earth may walk the White Road.

The Blood Path forms the crucible of human generation within the earth, descended from the ultimately pure Adam Kadmon (universal man) template into the world. Within this path is found all the human institutions of perpetuation which arise from the desire to extend one’s self into future generations. Without this blood consciousness path, humanity would not persist in its survival as a species, nor would it grant the soul the opportunity to evolve through incarnational process.

The Blood Path can manifest in the actions of a Hitler Anti-Christic being, or through the Body and Blood of a Christed Yeshua. Yet when communion is taken through the sacrament of the Holy Eucharistic, and the Body and Blood are transmitted etherically through the host & wine, the Blood Path is then transformed into the Path of the White Stone, for the act of this most sacred consummation is a path into Grace, and Grace is the mantle of the Path of the White Stone. (This is only one example of red to white transmutation, as it is to be found in all religions and in many acts of daily life. It’s power is not through a rite or ritual but through the HEART.)

Through Yeshua’s Blood Path, He opens to us the Christic White Stone or shining pillar of eternal Presence that is above and beyond all earthly blood bonds and consciousness.

The Red Road is by its nature, opaque, for it impresses its shade and form into all that which it empowers. It is the worldly way, that of due process and linear evolution. It forms a crucible for all that which has been, and is to come, in the realm of the human experience. It is both the womb and the tomb, the cycles of life from revivification to dissolution, time and time again. It is the law of the Red Road that whatsoever you create within its crucible, so that creation must return to the same cup from whence it arose.

It is the White Road that carries you beyond the blood cup and into the realm of the superlate, where Divine Presence sustains the form unto eternity. Yet the White and Red Roads do, and must, interact upon the Earth at this time. It is necessary for an individual stepping onto the higher paths of evolution to recognize the directional flow of current between the two.

When the directional flow of current is from Red to White, matter is being drawn upon to feed Spirit. In this manner, the Red Road colors all work of the Spirit with its shade, and therefore Spirit assumes the nature of the Blood realm.

When the directional flow of current is from White to Red, the divine Presence is being inserted directly into the Blood Path, and therefore holds no allegiance to the Red Road, for it was not birthed in the crucible of the blood cup, and yet it influences its evolutionary expansion. Only in this way can Spirit work unrestrained from the strong magnetic ties of the Blood Path.

It is for this reason that certain groups of individuals who have been given Hierarchical sanction to establish earthen stations of Light are being guided by the Hierarchy to free these focuses from being sustained directly by the Red Road, which incorporates all worldly profit orientated exchanges. If the Light focus is dependent on the exchange of its services for its survival, its directional current is from Red to White, and is therefore trapped within the cyclic function of the Blood Path and thereby owes allegiance to that path. This is not to say that monetary exchange for services and products etc. cannot be a part of that Station of Light’s reality, but only as a result of true service, and not as a necessary means of survival.

Certainly all monetary type support comes ultimately from the Red Road, but through the unconditional donations of other Light seekers sharing in the vision of the White Flame offered through these Stations of Light, so the WHITE STONE frequency shall be inserted into the RED BLOOD matrix of the earth. As the blood is touched by the stone, true alchemy of divine Presence is brought into the blood life, and from this union arises the Corpus Christi, the body of Christ which represents the actualization of Christic consciousness and principle manifest in the earthen experience.

Again, we reiterate that the Path of the White Stone, or White Road, is the generation of a frequency of superlate being that permeates all with which it comes into contact, and beyond that radius, through the law of transduction, relays energy from one field to another, ad infinitum.

Those souls who involve themselves in the service of maintaining the physical path of these appointed Stations of Light, become transducers of that vibration themselves. Further, in submitting to this process of service, so each individual involved will undergo his / her own deep inner experience with the White Road versus Red Road, as they must release the old path in order to be received of the New.

When Christos bore the mantle of its Host, Yeshua (Jesus) and walked thereby upon the earth, He was the Living White Stone come among you. His Presence instructed your souls and built them up as towers of Light into the sky. Even for those not incarnate in His time, this is so. Yet the Christed Master Yeshua while embraced in His glory, tithed the Blood Path, giving of his Body and Blood into the earth through the way of suffering so that earth’s humanity might be able to free itself from the Crimson Sash–the Blood Path symbolized in Atlantean Temples by the wearing of a crimson sash. As He laid himself down into the Blood Crucible, so He took up eons of karmic suffering upon Himself, and through the pure Presence of the divine within him, he washed the world clean and bade it to be restored through His being.

Even in that moment that this was accomplished, the world plunged its heart once again into the ruby cup, returning to the blood principle. Yet out of this act of pure devotion to the world, there was a single bright and shining seed remaining unscathed by the renewed vow of humanity to perpetuate the Red Road. This one single seed survives in the Holy Matrix of the Heart-Cup within the White Stone. It is tenderly guarded by the Angels of Christ and transplanted again and again into the hearts of the New Hierophants to whom the Scriptures of Light are revealed. And who are these new Hierophants, but all souls who come to desire the Path of the White Road so completely as to put nothing before them that is not a way to this path.

To hold divine Presence in the earth is not a virtue held exclusively for Angels and Gods. It abides at the very foundation of the human experience as God-engendered consciousness made flesh. Such an act requires only a great and loving desire to serve Spirit beyond the manifestations of personal will and power, identity or cause.

Yeshua called to the apostles, “Come, follow me and I will make you fishers of men.” So they set down their nets and followed Him, not looking behind them. The Master Yeshua was summoning these humble men to walk with Him upon the White Road. In that moment, so they desired nothing, sought nothing, imagined nothing but that which was before them through the Vision of Christ — the White Pillar, the Shining Stone. He did not then persuade these men, nor did He magnetize or enchant them. He instead was so completely in ‘Presence’ that these fishermen could not dispute what was before them. The divinity within their souls was compelled by the Holy Presence of the Christ in Yeshua to follow its natural inclination of Spirit, which was to abide solely upon the White and Shining Way.

So each soul embodied in the earth may in kind, follow the living stone which is the pillar of Christ, upon the White Road. They may know at a moment’s notice this Presence in their midst, which in turn lights in their soul the very same Flame. To become ‘Presence’ in the earth embraces the entire Light Program of the Universal Hierarchy for the souls of earth. No oath, practice, surrender, contemplation or service beyond this is required. Through the Blood Path the earth’s Light Program can be completed, yet it will be thousands if not millions of years in the doing. By taking up the Path of the White Stone and thus assuming the Christic Mantle–not in a religious sense, but in a spiritual sense–which may be embraced by souls upon the path of any God-based religion, so eons are erased from the karmic clock and mankind is in the moment at the Throne of God. This is the whole purpose of the Christ, both Universal and in the earth –– to offer a path of Grace, a path of absolution so complete as to eradicate even the need for a Hierarchy beyond this foundation of Light; the Christ.

The Holy Matrix which is given the name of Hebron, is that which contains the sweetest nectar of the Heart-Cup, for it feeds the multitude from but a single drop. The Holy Matrix of Hebron is a living temple in the etheric which calls forth divine issuance from the souls who seek to serve the Heart-Cup at the center of the White Stone. For the soul who cries “I am thy Vessel, oh Lord!” so the Holy Matrix opens its flowered cup and the Stone becomes the elixir of Eternal Life. A stone contains an impenetrable surface, hard and smooth to the touch. The alchemy of Love causes the surface of the stone to become transparent as a crystal, to reveal the living flower within.

Initiates of the Flower see through the surface of the Stone as the veils part for them. Each of the seven veils or Manifests contain a vibrational essence that is both revealing and commanding. Once gazing upon the interior of the Manifest, the soul cannot but come forth from the tomb. It becomes an act beyond conscious choice, yet the conscious mind is given enlightenment as to the movement at hand; for within the vibration of Hebron, the mind is privy to the heart’s passage.

Once the Path of the White Stone is entered to the degree of the Holy Matrix of Hebron, the etherization of the blood does and indeed must take place, for in order to become the Presence of the White Stone, so the blood of the body must diminish its resonance with the frequency of the Blood Path.

The soil of the Red Road is tilled by the blood-suffering of the human element in its attempts to purify the body to the state of the soul. There are those few incarnate in this age who have opened the scroll to the vision of the macrocosm, and as a result, can apply this vision to move beyond the purification type rendering of the Blood Path. This not only releases them from the way of suffering to achieve spiritual oneness with God–the complete Presence of the White Road–but it gives these souls a measure of immunity from the many interactive fields of human expression that supply the grist for the mill of the blood-suffering consciousness. This in turn allows them to do the Great Work on a level unfettered by the Blood Path.

However, not even the Christ Incarnate was intended to completely separate from the Blood Path, for there must be a link between the two Roads in order for earth to pass through the eye of the needle–the Star Grail of the ascension. But evermore shall humanity come to unchain itself from the Red Road, so that it may truly know the White Way, and yet still serve the Blood Path from a higher evolutionary position upon the sacred tree.

How can an individual incarnated on earth at this time serve the Grail? First, you must, as the Atlantean Grail ancestors declared, ‘Alu kevah asat’ — “live the Grail.” To a greater degree of fidelity it must become incorporated into your being and into the demonstration of all that you carry forth. In order that this may become a reality in your lives, so you must first seek to know and then embrace the truth of the Red and White Grail Paths–the Blood Path and the Path of the White Stone. This truth residing in the WHITE to RED insertion is a vibrational Presence within you. True service to the Grail is a selfless one, born not of personal need or lower desire for an identity in spiritual service, but instead from the consuming in the body, heart and mind of the Passion of Christ which is not, as some dogma has perceived it, that of suffering along the Blood Path. It is instead the result of the true passion found within the soul when it engages in absolute union with Spirit. This is the Passion the Christed Yeshua experienced on the Cross. It is not pain crystallized into ecstasy, but love moved to know the divine through its freedom from pain. While to the mind, this may appear as a subtle difference, to the soul the comparison is great.

The Blood Path is a stairway the soul traverses through pain to know God. The Great White Way or Path of the White Stone, is a complete surrender to Grace, and does not involve the path of suffering. Through the White Stone, one does not simply ‘know God,’ but consumes Him. In this way the soul becomes God, for the register of the divine is in all things, yet it must be awakened through taking the Host of God into the interior being and offering it to the depths of the soul. Before the Grail can serve others through you, so you must dedicate yourself to knowing the Grail within.

<!-- END ARTICLE: 905 -->

## Article 906: The Johannine Templars: Whom Does the Grail Serve?


The Johannine Templars: Whom Does the Grail Serve?

As you will have noticed on this site, the Priory of the White Stone is under a new mantle – theJOHANNINE TEMPLARS. Most of the priories within our former Order also left that platform. Several of these founded a NEW Templar Station, with Michael Henry Dunn at the helm. Yet in this version, while we have a respected personage in the lead, we are a far more inclusive Order. All the founders, myself and MHD included, are in a role of equality in Service.

There comes a defining moment in every Soul’s questing, where we are asked the inner question: WHOM DOES THE GRAIL SERVE? This defining moment arrived rather abruptly for the founders of the Johannine Templars. In unison, we did not hesitate in answering the inquiry.

Following thePath of the White Stone, one must recognize where true idolatry lies. It is not in the worshiping of a stone idol (a nonetheless mis-guided agency), but in placing any earthly gain above spiritual integrity and pursuit. We have chosen to stay the course of Way of the White Flaming Pillar –Krystos Illuminus. To this journey we, as Johannine Templars, offer our service and our souls.

~ Dame Maia Kyi’Ra Nartoomid

---

## Article 911: The Sign of the Dove


The Sign of the Dove

The stone with the Dove is to be found at Minerve, in Southern France at the site of an ancient Cathafortress near the region Rennes Le Chateau. It was carved by Jean-Luc Severac in commemoration of the 140 Cathars who were buried alive there in 1210 as a result of persecution by the Church of Rome. Elizabeth Van Buren writes about the Cathars in her book, THE SIGN OF THE DOVE:

“These people called themselves the Pure. They said that they were waiting the return of the Paraclete, the reign of the Holy Spirit. They were known as Cathari or Albigensians and were respected by the local clergy and the nobility, although they were considered unrealistic in their ideals.”

According to THOTH, the Cathars, had an innermost Order that guardianed the wellspring of the Johannine doctrine originating for the most part, with St.John the Divine. The core of this teaching is to be found in the “BOOK OF LOVE”, anancient text written by St. John and kept, historians tell us, “in a leaden casket in the depths of a cavern”. To quote from THE SIGN OF THE DOVE, this sacred bookcontained:

“… sublime teachings, marvelous revelations, the most secret words confided by our Lord Jesus Christ to the beloved disciple. Their power would be such that all hatred, all anger, all jealousy would vanish from the hearts of men. The Divine Love, like a new flood, would submerge all souls and never again would blood be shed on this earth.”

The Cathars believed that when Jesus was baptized, the Archangel Michael appeared as a dove, signaling the entry of the Christ into its Host, Jesus. From Van Buren’s THE SIGN OF THE DOVE:

“In the Ancient Mysteries the Dove was the symbol of the third person of the Creative Triad, the Trinity. It was taught that as the lower worlds were brought into being through the generative process, the Dove was to be associated with those goddesses who were identified with the procreative functions. We find, therefore, this pure white bird sacred to Venus, Astarte, and Isis. Not only is the Dove the emblem of the maternal instinct with its gentleness and compassion, but it is also a Messenger of the Divine Will, portraying the Power as well as the Wisdom of the Creator.”

The Dove, for Johannine Grove, embraces these principles, seeing the Dove as the Passage of Grace for the “Light Redemption” of the Earth into the 3rd Milleniumconsciousness of the NEW EARTH STAR.

“In Arthurian legend the Dove flies like a sign from heaven across the hall of the Grail Castle, preceding the Grail Procession with its Hallows, flooding the scene with unearthly light, preparing the heart for revelations from another plane.”– Mary Caine, THE GLASTONBURY ZODIAC



<!-- END ARTICLE: 911 -->

---

## Article 913: The Divine Feminine in Christianity & Mythos


The Divine Feminine in Christianity & Mythos

This piece on the Divine Feminine was originally written by me in the year 2000 as part of a paper I prepared for my studies in the Sophia Divinity School of the Church of Antioch, Malabar Rite. It has been slightly modified as the article below.

~~~~~~~~

The “Isis-Sophia-Mari” archetype (and other representations of the Divine Feminine) can be seen as a cathedral created by the architect of God/Source. She is the receptive element in all mankind that naturally uplifts to embrace divinity.

In the myths of the ancient Egyptians, Isis is seen as the primary Divine Feminine figure, although she shared her role with other aspects of Herself personified in the archetypes of numerous goddesses such as Nut, Bast and Hathor. One of the earliest Holy Trinities was composed of Osiris (Divine Father), Isis (Divine Mother) and Horus (Divine Son).

It was Isis to whom the Lesser Mysteries were ascribed. Her inscription upon the Temple of Sais stands as testimony to the power invested in her by the ancient priests and priestesses: “I am that which is, which hath been, and which shall be; and no man has ever lifted the veil that hides my Divinity from mortal eyes.”

Her symbol was the moon to which the Virgin Mary is esoterically linked, especially within the Latin cultures. The “Lady of Guadalupe” stands with the crescent moon beneath her feet.

Mythically, Isis gathered together the 14 pieces of Osiris’ body after he had been slain and dismembered by Set. In doing so, she became the vehicle for re-creation of the masculine principle in order for it to once again be received into the higher heaven.

Sophia is the universal aspect of the “God-ness” that eternally gives birth to the cosmos. She is the Divine Presence manifested in the cosmos which becomes the pure element through which the spiritual revelation of the Logos (Creative Word of God/Christ) takes place. Sophia appeared in medieval Jewish cabalism as the Shekhinah (Bride) of God.

Mari is possibly the most personal Earth Mother aspect of the Divine Feminine. It is she who births and nurtures the Child of Light in the world. For the church of the New Testament, Mary was seen as the meeting point of the Old and New Testaments. In this position, she embodied both the people of Israel and the “Daughter of Zion” and the new born church of Christianity.

The Holy Presence within the sacred cathedral of Isis-Sophia-Mari is that of the Christos. The Isis-Sophia-Mari suspends the thought of actualization until the Seed of Christ can be firmly planted to the heart and soul. As pure Feminine Divinity, or the receptive aspect God, Isis-Sophia-Mari holds together the strands of potential in the Womb of Light within, within which human kind struggles to be born. She embodies the hope and nurturing from spirit, that as Children of God, we all seek to receive. Isis-Sophia-Mari is also that aspect of ourselves that loves us and showers us with motherly care, preparing our souls to become the Bride of the Lord.

Humanity will continue to rapidly move beyond its own spiritual and physical boundaries in the New Millennium. It is then that our receptive selves will open wider to accept all the potentials and possibilities offered to us by spirit, and thereby claim the birthright of Isis-Sophia-Mari to be “born again” through the kingly Presence of the “Son of Suns”, the Cosmic Christ.

“Mary is the great mold of God, fashioned by the Holy Spirit to give human nature to a man who is God by the hypostatic union, and through grace to make persons who are like to God”– St. Louis Mary Grignion de Montfort

<!-- END ARTICLE: 913 -->

## Article 914: SIGJAH & the Siege Perilous


SIGJAH & the Siege Perilous

In Arthurian legend, the Siege Perilous (also known as The Perilous Seat) is a vacant seat at the Round Table reserved by Merlin for the knight who would one day be successful in the quest for the Holy Grail. The English word “siege” originally meant “seat or throne,” coming from the Old French sege (modern French siège); the modern military sense of a prolonged assault comes from the conception of an army “sitting down” before a fortress.

In Thomas Malory’s Le Morte d’Arthur, in an account taken from the Vulgate Queste del Saint Graal,[3] the newly knighted Sir Galahad takes the seat in Camelot on Whitsunday, 454 years after the death of Jesus. The Siege Perilous is so strictly reserved that it is fatal to anyone else who sits in it. Another version of this story is related in Alfred Tennyson’s Idylls of the King.

Originally, this motif about the seat and the grail belonged to Perceval, but the Lancelot-Grail Cycle transferred it to the new Cistercian-based hero Galahad. It appears, for example, in the earlier De Boron Didot Perceval, where Perceval occupies the seat at Arthur’s court at Carduel. According to many scholars, the motif of the dangerous seat can be further traced to Welsh, Cornish, and Breton mythology, from whence the bulk of the Arthurian legend was derived. According to this theory, the Siege Perilous was a half-remembered version of a Celtic kingship ritual that has parallels in the Irish Lia Fáil.-Wiki

~~~~~~~~~~

Recently, my inner-planes mentor ThothHorRa requested that I create an artwork under his direction or over-lighting. He named it the SIGJAH or  theSeat of the Solar Ward.  This Logos radiates a Living Radiance of spiritual authority that is obtained through the direction of specific service to what Thoth calls the “Grail Legacy.” It registers beyond Orders. It is an Eminence of Soul Service.

Thoth informed me that it has been offered through legend as the Siege Perilous or Perilous Seat, although the legend is a mere shadow of its true emanation. With this information in hand, I sent through my archives, searching for mention of the Seige Perilous. I found the following…

~~~~~~~~~~

From my work of the 1980’s – THE MERLIN CHRONICLES

Some relevant information to assimilate with all that has been written in these Chronicles are the following quotations from Gareth .Knight’sThe Secret Tradition in Arthurian Legend:

“Merlin is, however, no mere illusionist. He represents a humanized Western form of the ancient gods of learning and civilization, such as the Greek Hermes or the Egyptian Thoth.( Both Hermes and Thoth are the same personage – also the same as the Thoth/Merlin who supplied most of the information for this book. – CSE) He is furthermore, one of those, akinto Melchizedek’ in the Old Testament, ‘without father or mother, without descent.'” This should be understood from· the perspective that the Master Initiate is always born from parents who embody the ‘Mysteries’: he/she is then born of the Mysteries, his human lineage absorbed by the Plan incorporated in the Mysteryhood. “These are the great superhuman figures who work behind the scenes of planetary evolution, ‘sometimes appearing physically to selected disciples at particular times of opportunity or crisis, but for the most part unseen, working through chosen human intermediaries. They are known in Eastern esoteric literature as ‘Manus’. In this role Merlin brought the secret teaching of doomed Atlantis, at the end of its phase, to the new world of Europe, and founded first the Hibernian Mysteries, the vestiges of which come down to us in the mythology of Ireland. Following this, and from other Western seaboard outposts, the same teaching spread to the rest of the islands of Britain and Continental Europe.”

Thoth says that as Merlin, he “reconstituted” the Hibernian Mysteries, but they were first established by him as Thoth Raismes, the Egyptian – Initiate of the Atlantean and‘Blue Star’ Mystery Schools.

Gareth Knight continues:

“His Mandate came from a great primordial being who is traditionally called Narada. (Maia: The “Shining One” who visited both Hestor and his son Myrddin, granddaughter, Mercedes, great-grandson, Myyrith, and great, great-grandson, Galahad.) it was he who brought through to the consciousness of humanity, as a guiding light, the great solar pattern – of a central life-generating point surrounded by seven circles of force. This was the pattern of the great Sun Temple of Atlantis on the island of Ruta, and the spiritual pattern of civilization upon which the Atlantean human epoch was built. This, in the early days of Atlantis, was a secret teaching, confined to the sacred clan of aristocratic priest-initiates.”

The “great solar pattern” is an inner reflection of the central sun ‘atoma ‘ within the Earth, as well as being an outer reflection of the cosmic Sun, and further, the central Logos of the Universe. The latter-day Atlantean Wizards, such as Merlin ( an Atlantean through spiritual adoption ) based much of their Mysteries on the inner Earth realm and their genetic connection to the races inhabiting the central cavity of the planet.

Gareth Knight continues:

“At the end of the AtIantean epoch Merlin was charged to bring the new root race a more subtle and complex form of the plan. This new pattern was that of the Round Table…This added the concept of corporate responsibility through individual endeavor, in place of the emphasis on hierarchy…A further advance on the previous solar pattern is that the new formula takes cognizance of forces beyond our immediate solar system. With the Round Table, stellar forces and patterns are taken into account, for it is indeed a form of Zodiac. This teaching emanates from a cosmic centre of force that is concerned with the ‘universal’ evolution of consciousness as opposed to comparatively localized Solar or planetary evolution. For purposes of Earth consciousness that source of influence may be thought of as emanating from what appear to us to be the seven stars of the constellation of the Great Bear.”

The “Seven Sisters” of the Pleiades are the stars to which Mr. Knight is referring. These, according to Thoth, are one of the three governing stations of ‘Living Lights’ for ourworld. Years ago, long before my interest in or knowledge of Merlin and Arthurian legend ( other than what a child might glean from storybooks ), my “benefactor”, Thoth, took me on a voyage (etherically) into a chamber beneath the Great Pyramid of Giza in Egypt. There, to my amazement, within a gloriously shining room, was a large round table. it contained beautiful designs, colors and gems upon it, and it made me think of the Round Table in the children’s books. I was puzzled at the time about this Arthurian-looking table under the Pyramid in Egypt! Now I understand that the table I saw was no doubt an archetypal model of the Arthurian version. I do not believe it was the same relic, as it was far more elaborate than the one wh’ich seated the Knights. In retrospect, this episode exemplifies the connectiveness among all races and cultures, having within their Mysteries the same archetypal truths and inner-forms. This of course, is most especially viable within the context of reincarnation, where souls move throughout various cultures. Thoth was Thoth of Raismes, the Egyptian ( who also contained the genetics of Venus, the Blue Star, and Tibet ), and he was also Merlin, the mixture of Blue Star, Faery and Celtic.

(NOTE 2019:In 2018 the Round Table which I saw in that chamber was transported to a chamber inside Mt. Blanca, in the San Luis Valley of Colorado, near Crestone where I live.  (Treasures of the Sacred Valley.)

From a 1980’s issue of my publication THE SOURCE

The Cross of Divine Fire: It is an energy manifestation of the four-fold/ eight-fold patterning within the advanced logos of divine creative kinetics – the function of Divine Light being brought into ‘lesser light’ or elemental energy. Such power is seen at its most destructive in nuclear fission. In a centropic reversal of this process, divine creative kinetics occurs, where Divine Light centers its Eye within the perfect mean. The perfect mean is the Absolute – that which is the center of all consciousness, space and time. It is the Divine Eye as demonstrated in the Eye of Horus.

As the Divine Light is centered, it integrates with the laws of space and time, finding the commonalty of all its integers and manifesting, in radiant Light-Energy, a conduit for release into the lower ethers. This Light-Energy is the middle-ground between Divine Logos and Elemental creation. The Cross of Divine Fire is the actualization of this process. It is the battery or matrix for the integration of Light and Matter at its most radiant conquest of time, before the entropic ‘fall’ of Light into matter is complete. It is this ‘Divine Fire’ that will be reawakened to realign the etheric axis of the planet and be the Balance of Power between Dark and Light, as each strive to master the elements.

In your enactment of the Cross of Divine Fire, you will set the first ‘Blueprint’ for future awakeners. You will establish a bonding in the ethers with this energy pattern which will at once begin to send signals for future alignments out into the planetary ethers.

It will be accomplished as follows: four women will assume the negative poles, four men the positive poles. Since at this time you have only three women and one man, the absent positions will have to be filled with etheric doubles which will be provided if those positions are not filled physically by that time.

At Stonehenge you will position yourselves preferably physically but if not possible, mentally, so that the cross is made, with each participant activating one gem. You will visualize yourself as becoming that energy – the gem, the essence of the Culture (Race) Spirit, a priest/priestess of that very holy office. Stream this Being as Divine Light, flooding the recesses of your many-chambered form, out from your chakras and down the Cross to each other gem position. Connect and receive – open blocks, transcend spaces. Know that you stand within the streaming of Divine Energy which proceeds into Tachyon energy, into nuclear generation. You are part of a very real and dynamic Cross of Power – the reverse of nuclear fission. If certain positions are held by etheric doubles, acknowledge their presences as you would a physical entity. In the center stone, the Diamond Eye, so there will be Merlin, Master of the Stone. This position is analogous to the “Siege Perilous” of the Arthurian Mystery. It is a vibration of absolute confrontation with the balance of Dark and Light within the initiate/quester.

While each of these gemstones are connected to a race culture, these race cultures are those which have absorbed and channeled that particular aspect of Divine Energy. Know that beyond this form, the Cross of Divine Fire is universal in its Light/Matter dynamics. At Tor Hill, also perform the Cross of Divine Fire. These two places then, are your access points to the power of the Cross – Stonehenge and Tor Hill.

MAY THE DIVINE FIRE KINDLE WITHIN THY HEARTS AND MINDS, A BURNISHING FLAME EVERLASTING. OUT OF THE DEPTHS OF THE MOLTEN SEA, THY ETERNAL GARMENT IS MADE. LET IT BE THY COMPANION, THY SHIELD, FOR YE ART MANY AMONG THE ONE, AT¬ONE, AMEN.

So the body-soul of Merlin is inbreathed into its suspended body, the energy engram inscribed upon the heart chakra of Quetzalcoatl will outbreathe upon the planet. The heart chakra of Merlin is the same energy as the incarnation of Quetzalcoatl now interred beneath the Tule Tree. Over the area of the Crystal Cave in which Merlin is suspended, there once physically grew a Yew Tree. Although it no longer stands, its spirit form remains, as guardian of Merlin’s heart chakra, still alive beneath the roots of the spirit tree. It is these roots of the Tule and the Yew that keep the two heart chakras alive.

Question:In connecting the constellation of Orion with the upcoming Harmonic Convergence of this August, Jim Berenholtz writes,“..the Belt of Orion, together with Betelguese and Rigel will be seen as the Silver Cross, the Cross of Quetzalcoatl, the Cross of Peace and Redemption, which according to prophecy returns from the East… This Cross in Orion is also the hull of the Celestial Arc when viewed from below. The Arc is there for us to fill with our prayers for Life, that it may carry us Home to the New World awaiting.”Is this “Silver Cross, the Cross of Quetzalcoatl”, in spiritual dynamics, the same as the “Cross of Divine Fire” given to us to be performed by Merlin’s Circle at Stonehenge and Glastonbury Tor?

THOTH:It is so. It is the Cross’ of the Divine Pathing, the release from karma that brings the exiled to the Sacred Rose in the center of convergence(the Seat of the ‘Siege Perilous’ ).

Question:Did Jesus have a son by Mary Magdalene?

THOTH:Jesus lived a life of celibacy, as was intended in the Divine Plan for Him. However, after his death and before his Ascension, He implanted His seed within Mary of Magdalene by Immaculate Conception. From this act of Spirit, Mary bore the ‘Sun of the Son’, John Martinus, on the Isle of lona (GB). the one chosen as her surrogate companion was Martinus Apollos, a Greek disciple of Christ. There was a close bond between Mary and Apollos, and thus she gave to her son his name as second to the name given by the Master for this child, when He appeared to her after the conception. John Martinus was canonized in the Celtic Church, founded in 4 B.C., and lived a full life of service. He was buried at Glastonbury, beneath the Eves of the Wrens.

Question:Why was John Martinus born?

THOTH:To serve as an anchor for certain Christ energies that were being diffused on the planet for the period of time beginning with the crucifixion and ending with the death of John Martinus. This diffusion was brought about by the separation of the ‘Divine Elements’ or particles of infused original Light composing an extra Light body which was the Christ’s Mantle inlayed upon the soul of the Master Initiate, Joshua ben Josef (Jesus). After the body of Jesus Christ was crucified, this Light Shield Body began to come apart – its Divine Elementals separating, and much like the spirit seeds of Quetzalcoatl’s heart chakra, entered the etheric body of the Earth in many different aspects of its design. The soul of John Martinus, ‘Sun of the Son’, acted as a contact or anchor to enable these Divine Elementals in the fragile process of separation, to retain their individual structure- of infused original Light until the process of separation was completed.

Now. in 2019I am being shown how the Seat of the Solar Ward, (aka the Perilous Seat) as a Living Radiance, was first brought to Earth by Lord Melchizedek from the Blue Star Rigel in Orion, through the Gate of the Guardian Venus. A “Living Radiance” in this context, is an energy mantle which one entity can pass to another in replicated form.

THOTH:Thus, the SIGJAH or Seat of the Solar Ward, found its way to Atlantis, through the migration of the Grail Family, after the Heaven Houses of Melchizedek was taken asunder by the Dark Priests. But alas, once again the Heaven Houses of Melchizedek fell, and the “Seat” was delivered to the Priests and Priestesses of the Atlantean province of Ruta, where the Most Holy of the Land did dwell. Here, the remainder of the Grail Kings and Queens, who were impressed with the SIGJAH remained in safely, until the Migration in the latter days, anticipating the destruction of Atlantis.

With the Migration, they carried the Radiance of the SIGJAH with them to many lands and kingdoms, Yet it also remained in Ruta with a select few. When Ruta (by then an island) ascended in the Time Tsunami that rent the rest of the continent asunder, so the SIGJAH was carried also, into the higher elementation. All that remained of it in the Lower World was within a very few. MERLIN contained the SIGJAH, which he passed to Authur, Galahad and select others during his 300 years of life.

The Living Logos of the SIGJAH emanates the presence of the SIGJAH for those who may wish to become inspirited by its power to claim their own true Field and Valor.

~~~~~~~~~~

Maia:I was instructed by Thoth to create in the virtual world of Second Life – on (or rather above) the “land” which I call Ruta, a Templar Lodge in which to house the Sigjah Logos art. As directed by Thoth, I employ the “sacred space” in virtual reality to use as a conduit in anchoring certain creations into the etheric body of Earth and the higher state of Creation through which humanity activates its truest spiritual expressions.

As I was creating this Templar Lodge with its Logos of the Seat of the Solar Ward, I could feel the Presence of it pouring through me – almost to the point of pulling me into another realm.

Below is a Gallery showing the Templar Lodge of the Sigjah (of Ruta in the Virtual):

~~~~~~~~~~

Thoth also shows me a “Lost Rune” that represents the SIGJAH:



~~~~~~~~~~

Footnote:As so often happens, the first store I went to, there was a building called “the Lodge” – perfect for my Templar Lodge. Of course I added the furnishings as sacred elements to it.

~~~~~~~~~~

---

## Article 915: Revelations on Mari of Magdalene


Revelations on Mari of Magdalene

Around 2005 I created a portrait of Mari of Magdalene based on my insight from the Akasha. The medium I used was the 3D computer graphic program Poser. When I looked at what I had created I though she really didn’t seem too attractive. She has been so idealized that all art renditions of her depicted here as Anglo-beautiful. So quite honestly, I kinda hid this picture. I had it on my old Spirit Mythos site, now an archive and not long ago I took it off.

Well, today I came across a video that changed everything for me about this art work.

It was a video containing an image of the reconstructed face of a skull, said to be  “Mary Magdalene.” The reconstruction is almost identical to my Poser portrait of her!

My akashic portrait on the left is around the age of 25. The  skull reconstruction on the right, is of a 49 or 50 year old Mari.



(Below written around 2005)My akashic perspective of Mari Magdalene is somewhat different from what is being written about as a result of the book “Holy Blood, Holy Grail” and other such books through the years. There are similarities, but differences as well.

Briefly her history as revealed to me

Mari M was a cousin of I’shoa (Jesus). She was his one female Apostle and as such, there became an accumulation of female disciples of the Christed I’shoa who gathered about her and Mari Anna (I’shoa’s mother), especially after His Ascension. Yes, according to my “conversations” with Thoth, I’shoa did ascend. He did not fake his death.

The major differences between the akashic/Thoth’s version as received by me and theHoly Blood, Holy Grail / Da Vinci Codeversions (and other such books following the same story line)

1) I’shoa’s body did “die” on the cross.

2) His soul re-claimed the body in the tomb.

3) He ascended his entire form into the higher spiritual world – it’s “location” in the subtle-physical being in the sun-star Rigel within the constellation of Orion (where the New Earth Star is now forming – it’s first stage being Numis’OM).

4) Mari, a priestess of Magda did not “marry” I’shoa in a sense recognized by traditional Jewish law.

From material I source translated from the akashic in 1997:

Another piece of the story from Thoth

The three Maris (Mari Magdalene, Mari Anna and Mari Martha) first came to Glastonbury with Josef of Arimathea, the great-uncle of I’shoa. While there they re-established and “updated” an ancient order of Priestesses of Avalon.

Josef of Arimathea was the uncle of Mari Anna. Mari Magdalene was the sister of Lazarus and cousin of I’shoa. Mari Martha was the sister of Mari Anna, and thus the aunt of I’shoa. Of even greater confusion, while Lazarus was the true son of Josef of Arimathea, Mari Magdalene was a “foster” child. BUT she did come from the Davidic linage and still WAS a cousin of I’shoa. I became quite confused with this originally, whenyears ago I stated that Josef A. whose true name was Josef Mathias, was the half-brother of Mari Anna.As I am shown this part of the akashic record now, I see that my mistake lay in the “fact” (from my recent conversation with Thoth) that Mari Anna did have a half-brother…named Josef Mathias, after her uncle!

2019 –What I didnotreveal above, but I knew at the time:

At Ephesus, Mari of Magdalene’s grave had been defiled. Her bones were taken. The purpose would have been to eventually sell them to those still ardently following the Teachings of I’shoa. There were the wealthy among them. I did not receive anymore about it at the time.

Now in 2019, I am being shown that Her skull and bones made their way back to France – not by the thief but by someone who had obtained the skull, and felt it should be returned to her sacred grotto.

~~~~~~~~~

Also of interest, is the linage of I’Shoa and Mari (who were, as stated above cousins). There was a great deal of “star genetics in the Davidic Family. Yet even more concentrated in the particular branch of that family which birth I’shoa and Mari. This is the same “Blue Star Rigel” family from which came Akhenaten, the “Heretic” Pharaoh of Egypt, whom Thoth calls the last Shepherd King. Thoth both as TothMusZuRud and Thoth, Raismes of Aphra were Blue Star genetics. The former was pure Rigelian, coming to earth in a Merkabah of Light.

While Raismes had a squarish face, TothMusZuRud’s features were long and thin. Both Mari Magdalene and I’shoa’s faces were long.

My portraits of I’shoa (I will admit I think the distance from mouth to tip of chin a little too long in these portraits, but but not to an extreme degree).

Face on Jesus’ Shroud (artist rendition)



ThothMusZuRud



Akhenaten



~~~~~~~~~~~

The Skull and Bones of Mary Magdalene

---

## Article 916: Jesus as a Time Traveler


Jesus as a Time Traveler

As we near a time of year Holy to Christians, I felt I wished to share the Thothic Perspective on the true Man and “container” of Arch-Angelic Light he carried during his 33 years on earth. He still is a Grail for this Light, not only in many hearts and minds, but as a Cosmic Presence.

I write this not as a Christian, but as an expanding Soul of Light, as we all are on this journey through incarnations, time and space…and beyond. First, I must ask myself this question” AM I a Christian? Well, I am an ordained Priest within theAscension Alliance. I was ordained through the Church of Antioch, which is an Independent Catholic Church. I might state that at the time, very “Independent.” It has since become more aligned to the Roman Catholicism,  which is why I am no longer a priest in that church. I recognize “Jesus” (Yeshua, I’shoa, Issa) as a unique Spiritual Master who physically walked the earth and lived among us and who continues to oversee the spiritual path of humanity from a Higher Realm.

So in that sense, I am a Christian. However, I do not limit myself to a belief system which contains only a few remnants of His Truth, mixed with very human ideas and dogmas which I see as having no true bearing on his life or mission.

As a child, along with my parents I was an Episcopal and went to church most Sundays. But my parents were not narrow-minded in their beliefs. I was encouraged to think for myself and more importantly, tofeelfor myself.

When at the age of about seven, I said to my mother:sometimes we see only a small part of something and so we don’t believe there is any more, she wrote it down.

At the age of 17 the Ultra Beings who came to me, and to some extent to my mother as well, helped me to work in the Akasha. It was from there that I “opened the scrolls” to many greater truths, including the life of  Jesus and the Mysteries of the Christ. Some 10 years later, my mentor ThothHorRa made his presence known to me, and my education on these subjects continued in earnest.

According to my communion with Thoth, his soul is one of theNine Sun Spiritsoverseeing this earthly realm. Two of the other Sun Spirits together became I’shoa or Jesus. One of these two was the “Pure Soul” who was able to invoke the Christic Archangel into his being at the time of Baptism. So Thoth and I’shoa are shall we say, closely related on both a spiritual and para-genetic level.

Yet there is another even more dramatic element to the story of I’shoa from the Thoth Akasha.

Thoth has spoken to me of what he calls theRanna Time Wave.This is not a “time line.” It is the true flow of time in this universe. There are many time lines aligned within it. However on this planet and within our Holographic Universe, a fracture occurred due to human will and interference with Divine Accords, which cause a from of separation of Earth from the Ranna. This Thoth refers to as theKali Rift. The physical act which caused this rift was the Time Tsunami – a final blow to Atlantis.  An accidental rupture in time, this tsunami was created by some Altanteans attempting to fix a problem they had created (long story).

The Thoth Akasha reveals that even though the Rift was triggered by an Event in the time of Atlantis, it’s actual point of separation was during the crucifixion of Christ.

In order to understand the connection between the Kali Rift and crucifixion of Jesus Christ, the following need be understood…

I am now calling the two souls of I’shoa: The Pure Soul and the Osiris Soul. When I first received the basic information on these two souls I did not have as much understanding about the dynamic as I do now in more recent years. Remember, my journey with the Akasha and Thoth spans over 52 years now as of 2019. I was 17 then and am now 70. So my own evolution and developing awareness has shaped how I relate to and thus express…what I have received through these many years.

The Pure Soul has had no incarnation in any physical world previous to his life as I’shoa. The Osiris soul has incarnated in other times. His last incarnation before sharing the Jesus experience, was as the ultra-terrestrial man, OSIRIS. Thoth has told me that this entity – Osiris, remains in some kind of supernal state (non-physical) within the Vault of Osiris beneath the Great Pyramid of Giza (the Temple of the Risen One). He was able to enter the incarnative body of I’shoa/Jesus through a form of “time travel.” Now I will admit that at this point for me, I have not yet grasped the full understanding what this means. How I am currently viewing it, is that the Christic mission of the soul of Osiris is to establish a portal through time for the Christic Element within the Pure Soul. This is necessary in order for the Christic Element to be able to project the FULL PRESENCE OF ITS RAYSHIP into the Lower Heaven or state of our fractured reality. From the Thothic perspective, all is quantum. Thus, the Osiris Soul acts for the entire Christic dynamic, as thequantum particle, appearing in all places/dimensions at once. It is the glue holding the whole dynamic together.

It is the soul of Osiris that will become a key instigator of the actualLP-40Ascension Moment, as “he” performs theFire Star Dancewithin the Vault of Osiris at the appointed time.

Now, returning to the crucifixion of Jesus. When the Christic Archangel entered the I’shoa incarnation at the time of Baptism, so the Osiris Soul departed. At the Portal Keeper, he had done his work…for the time-being. When I’shoa was on the cross, so the Arch-Angel departed and Osiris returned…to again open the portal for the Archangel and to hold the Pure Soul just above the Life Stream. For I’shoa would return to raise the body….a body containing the gematria for the para-genetic continuation and evolution of human kind on earth.

With this portal opened, so the full presence of the Christic Mission rushed back into the Ranna Time Wave. Yet the fracture – the Kali, split off the full impact of this event into several fractured time lines. This is a whole story unto itself I will not go into here. Suffice to say that when the “Ascension Moment” of LP-40, the Light Principle Event occurs, these fractured lines will be brought back together in order that we may “meet him in the sky.”

If indeed this Akashic insight is genuine, the CHRIST and life and death of I’shoa becomes a central and defining Moment of our voyage into the New Earth Star.

As with all of my Akashic Translations and Thothic Transmissions, what I have shared here is not intended to further a Dogma. I only offer the reader/listener insight into my own spiritual experience.

****************

---

## Article 917: The Order of the Light Templars


The Order of the Light Templars

(picture: art by Maia of Thoth as one of theTemplus Saratum)

Message from the Seat of the Illumined (and Thoth) to Maia…… 3/3/84

The Order of the Light Templars radiates from the Illumined as vestments of Light to be assumed by initiates of the outer world.  These initiates, while they are a part of the stream of exoteric life, so they are infused before birth by the exaltation of Light from the Living Spirit.  This infusion is not a true integration, but rather a halo or aureole of guardianship and divine mission which oversees the initiate.

Once the initiate assumes his/her shining raiment, so he/she unites or weds the aureole of guardianship above him with the veil of authority about him.  In assuming the authority of his life mission in Spirit, so the initiate steps into the circle labyrinth of the Inner Mysteries.

He commits himself to the Divine Riddle, in faith and complete renunciation of self.  In taking up the work of the Light Templars, so the initiate becomes the elixir in the Grail Cup, sanctified and committed to the Living Substance of the World.

The initiate then, does not transcend the exoteric world to be received into the esoteric ethers of subtle body, as occurs in various other phases of the Illumined.  Instead, the Light Templar continues to dwell in the gross reality, even within his own body, while offering the Living Substance within the Grail Cup to the uninitiated.

Often this cannot be achieved directly, but in hidden design.  The Light Templar knows that although his body may still be confined to the karmic reality of matter, so his beknighted spirit serves the Spirit Divine.  To transcend entirely from the gross existence would sever the chord of service that the Order of the Light Templars extends into the density plane upon which most of Earth’s humanity dwells.

## Article 921: John Martinus: Light Bearing Son of I’shoa & Mari


John Martinus: Light Bearing Son of I’shoa & Mari

Returning to the subject of incorruptible bodies, awaiting their supernal release from matter, thereis also ‘suspended’ at Glastonbury, the uncorrupted body of Jesus’ (I’shoa) son, John Martinus, whowas born on the Isle of Iona to Mari Magdalene. This child was conceived after Christ’s death, andtherefore was ‘immaculate’ in nature. In Issue #3-87 of The Source, THOTH speaks upon the reasonfor this child’s birth: (It was) to serve as an anchor for certain Christ energies that were beingdiffused on the planet for the period of time beginning with the crucifixion and ending with thedeath of John Martinus. This diffusion was brought about by the separation of the Divine Elementalsor particles of infused original Light, composing an extra Light body which was the Christ Mantleinlaid upon the soul of the Master Initiate Joshua Ben Josef (Jesus). After the body of Jesus wascrucified, this Light Shield Body began to come apart — its Divine Elementals separating, and muchlike the spirit seeds of Quetzalcoatl’s heart chakra, entered the etheric body of Earth in manydifferent aspects of its design. The soul of John Martinus, Son of the Sun, acted as a contact oranchor to enable these Divine Elementals in the fragile process of separation, to retain theirindividual structure of infused original Light until the process of separation was completed.

~ Transmission from ThothHorRa to Maia

The Friendship Case

A unique video on not only contact with off-world races, but on-going communicationin the fleshand a developed friendship. This addresses those being who truly wish to aid us in a non-intrusive manner. You don’t hear a lot about them because theyarenon-intrusive.

My mother and I had them (not the specific ones in this video) visit us, and some telepathy from them to us came forth. They appeared to us in the room. In some cases my mother and I were together when it happened. I don’t know if the ones visiting us were in hologram or actually physically present. I think they were in some sort of semi-physical state tho, as when they would appear to me at night and I would suddenly awaken to see a 7 foot male standing right next to my bed I am ashamed to say I would scream. They would then quickly disappear. One time, as I was getting ready to scream, the man back away and put up his hands in a “pleeese don’t scream” gesture. When I asked about this later, they told me that screams “hurt” them when they were in that “state.” I must add that they were there only with permission from me to continue to come, as they were treating me for my health problems. I may not be alive today if not for them. This was in the 1970’s and ’80’s.

## Article 927: Starships Over Hawaii


Starships Over Hawaii

Wow! What a find for me with this video. As many of you know, I have lived on the island of Kaua’i now for a little over eight years, having resided on Maui for six months prior to that. I have friends on this island who have seen the ships. I have not, but then I do not spend much time outside, and hardly ever at night.

I have been told by my inner-planes mentor, ThothHorRa that there is a network of bases throughout these islands, and large ancient pyramids of MU underwater off the shores that are still being used energetically by the Star Ones from Orion, Pleiades and Sirius.

When Simeon and I were on Maui we heard from two different sources about the underwater pyramids – one of the two had a friend who had been diving for the government on some secret project to find them. He saw it with his own eyes and it was enormous.

I have been to that large pyramid on Oahu they show in the video…with Simeon and our dear Sistar, Ludmilla. Simeon and I have l also been to Haleakala on Maui several times…once on the Venus Transit of 2004.

The energy of these island is strong and other-worldly in the sense of how most people perceive “the world.” The Hawaiian Islands sit upon the Roil Point of the planet which will trigger the whole planetary ascension dynamic when the time comes. This is the main reason for such a strong Star Presence in these islands.

I am not discouraging outer non-violent actions, but in order to truly take this Beast by the horns and not only stop its rampage, but reverse the damage already done, we must turn to the power of interfacing with the quantum universe while our DNA is still in tact enough to do so.

When you sit down to eat and drink, put your hand over it and connect to the sacred I AM of your eternal Being, placing transformative LIGHT into the substances you are about to consume. Thrive: Torus & Crop Circles

My inner-planes mentor, ThothHorRa requested that I create this Tribelight Station site, not only to present videos and links to key websites concerning things humanity needs to know in these apocalyptic and transforming times post 2012, but to insert the keys into these “locks” humanity has strung together out of greed, fear and ignorance. In the following video excerpt from the THRIVE movie, the torus as the primary energy geometry of the universe is discussed, along with crop circle as energy components of the torus. The 64 Tetrahedron crystal (64 evenly spaced tetahedrons)  or Metatron’s CubeI recently wrote about, along with creating an energy art for it. The Metatron’s Cube or what Thoth calls the Asp’Tei (aaasp-teee–  meaning to “bring to order” “to adjust” “focus” “re-form” “re-calibrate”, etc.) is the core generator of the Toroidal field. When human beings come to understand how they can fully generate this natural field through their DNA and thus entire body, they will then become consciously and completely physically connected to the Earth’s and the Universal Grand Torus.
